eastward.callout:
84% Positive on Steam

Eastward - Octopia (DLC) available for purchase on Humble Store! Steam Deck playable
eastward.description_text:
Eastward is a beautifully detailed and charming adventure game, from Shanghai-based indie developers, Pixpil.

In the near-future, society is starting to collapse, and the human population is at an all-time low. A deadly toxic presence has spread across the land, destroying and devouring everything in its path.

Those who could escape the miasma flocked to underground villages to start a new life. But for a hardworking miner and a mysterious young girl, the hope of a thriving outside world beckons…

Escape the tyrannical clutches of Potcrock Isle's subterranean society and join Eastward’s unlikely duo on an exciting adventure to the land above! Discover beautiful yet bizarre settlements and make new friends as you travel across the world by rail.

Contains adult humour and some mature themes.

Game Features

Discover the wonderfully weird world of Eastward. Climb aboard the cross-country railway which spans this decaying continent, stopping off to explore its bustling towns, curious campsites and shady forests.

Fend off peculiar monsters and ferocious bosses with John’s weapon of choice - be it a flamethrower, cog-shooter or your trusty ol’ frying pan. Feeling merciful? Try temporarily stunning them with Sam’s kinetic blast.

Switch between John and Sam to solve environmental puzzles and fight your way through formidable dungeons. Separate the duo to unlock hidden paths or stick together as you traverse a perilous landscape.

Get to know a quirky cast of characters with oodles of personality! Immerse yourself in a heartwarming story-driven adventure, packed with fun and wacky humour.

Create deliciously authentic Eastwardian cuisine using (mostly) fresh, organic ingredients from toxic forests, potcrab farms and abandoned malls. These delicacies will grant health bonuses, power boosts and secret boons.

Bop along to a wonderfully upbeat soundtrack composed by Joel Corelitz (Death Stranding, Hohokum, The Unfinished Swan ), with sound design from Irish studio, Hyperduck Soundworks ( Dust: An Elysian Tail, Kingdom Rush )

sorrywereclosed.description_text:
Sorry We're Closed is a fusion of nostalgic survival horror with a new perspective on combat, combining atmospheric environments with fixed-camera angles and the thrill of arcade-style first person shooting. Collect items and manage resources to help Michelle survive. Optional tank controls are available for those who enjoy the classic survival horror experience.


ECCENTRIC NEON SURVIVAL HORROR

Follow the final days of Michelle as she battles to break the curse placed on her by a powerful archdemon looking for love. Help (or hinder!) the lives of the curious residents in Michelle’s bustling London borough as she pursues freedom from her own untimely demise. Michelle’s time is split between the perilous demon world and mingling with the locals on her residential street. Everyone is battling their own inner demons and through Michelle you can help guide them. Multiple endings are available through RPG-style dialogue interactions with the extravagant cast.


SNAP YOUR FINGERS AND OPEN YOUR THIRD EYE…

Michelle gains the power of the Third Eye, allowing her to peer between worlds and learn about the hidden denizens in her neighbourhood. Peel away the boundaries to uncover secret identities and solve puzzles.

The Third Eye will be Michelle’s strongest tool while battling her most threatening adversaries - especially in boss encounters! It can expose a demon’s weak points to deal maximum damage. Take enemies down with perfect weak point combos to charge up for the ultimate shot.

A WORLD OF ANGELS AND DEMONS

Thrust into a world of celestial beings, you can follow Michelle’s story as she battles to break the curse placed on her by a powerful demon looking for love. See what it means to be an angel or a demon, and what happens when they mix.

With multiple endings to discover, influence Michelle’s fate as the choices you make will open new opportunities to avoid or embrace the allure of the archdemon. Is there a right or a wrong? The more Michelle meddles, the more the lives of those around her change too. She’s not the only one whose fate can change.

If Michelle can brave the demon world, and keep her Hellhound pistol loaded, she might find a way to reclaim her destiny.

themedium.callout:
89% Positive on Steam

Steam Deck Unsupported

publishers.publisher-name: Bloober Team SA, NA PUBLISHING INC.

themedium.description_text:
You've Only Seen Half so Far

Discover a dark mystery only a medium can solve. Explore the real world and the spirit world at the same time. Use your psychic abilities to solve puzzles spanning both worlds, uncover deeply disturbing secrets, and survive encounters with The Maw - a monster born from an unspeakable tragedy..

The Medium is a third-person psychological horror game that features patented dual-reality gameplay and an original soundtrack co-composed by Arkadiusz Reikowski and Akira Yamaoka.

Become a Medium

Wield unique psychic abilities reserved for those with the gift. Travel between the realities or explore them both at the very same time. Use the Out of Body experience to investigate places where your real-world self can’t go. Create energy shields and deliver powerful spirit blasts to survive the spirit world and its otherworldly dangers.

See What's Hidden

Delve deep into a mature and morally ambiguous story, where nothing is what it seems and everything has another side. As a medium you see, hear and experience more than others, and with every new perspective you will change your perception on what happened at the Niwa resort.

Play in Two Worlds at the Same Time

Never-seen-before and officially patented gameplay that plays out across two worlds displayed at the same time. Explore the physical world and the spirit world simultaneously, and use the interactions between them to solve dual-reality puzzles, unlock new paths, and awaken memories of past events.

Enter a Dark Reality Inspired by Beksinski

The Medium’s spirit world is a dark mirror reflection of our reality, a grim and unsettling place where our unpunished deeds, evil urges, and vile secrets manifest themselves and can take on a form. This world has been invented and designed under the inspiration of Zdzisław Beksiński’s paintings, Polish dystopian surrealist internationally recognized for his distinctive and strikingly ominous style.

Music by Yamaoka & Reikowski

Immerse yourself in the disturbing and oppressive atmosphere of the game thanks to the original ‘dual’ soundtrack co-created by Akira Yamaoka and Arkadiusz Reikowski. Yamaoka-san is a legendary Japanese composer best known for his work on the Silent Hill series; Reikowski is a Hollywood Music in Media Awards nominee who worked on such acclaimed horror games as Blair Witch, Layers of Fear, and Observer. Now they join their creative forces for the music and songs of The Medium.

anno_mutationem.callout:
78% Positive on Steam

Steam Deck Verified
anno_mutationem.description_text:
Welcome to the neon-covered, 2D-meets-3D Cyberpunk world of ANNO: Mutationem. In this Action-Adventure game with RPG elements you become Ann: a highly-skilled combat-trained lone wolf on a personal mission in the giant Metropolis, full of sinister mega-corporations, mysterious fringe groups and creatures more bizarre than words can express.

Explore and discover
This is a world full of surprises waiting for you to find out! While going thru the main story you can chat with a Cyborg corgi, take on a part-time bartender job, hunt down vicious criminals reveal the true face of a trending V-streamer! By exploring diverse locations such as neon Noctis Town, an off-shore cargo ship and huge underground structures, players are free to go as they please and act as they want.

Showing new perspective
Unique 2D-to-3D gameplay, seamless switching between 2D Action n' Platforming and 3D Exploration to interact with the world and its inhabitants. Let's dive into pixel gaming from another perspective!

Ann kicks Ass
Ann will slash, shoot, combo, grenade-throw & ground-pound her way through hordes of enemies and huge bosses. From great swords to double blades, from pistols to rocket launchers and uppercuts, time to become the one-girl army you always knew you had in you.

Try to finish the jigsaw
A grand story, befitting a rich and dark cyberpunk décor, featuring our main hero Ann Flores and her trusty hyper hacker side-kick Ayane on a personal mission to find out where her missing brother has gone to. Little do the two know just what they will unravel…

Please arm yourself to teeth
Collect, buy or craft items & upgrade Ann's stats, skills and gear. Use chips to modify any kind of weapon you find. Equip Ann and make her combat-ready for all enemies (both humanoid and not…) that are about to head her way.

cabernet.callout:
94% Positive on Steam

Steam Deck Playable
cabernet.description_text:
Cabernet is a 2D narrative RPG set in a 19th century Eastern European inspired world, with a modern twist. Guide Liza, a young vampire struggling with her morality and the supernatural world she has been pulled into. Will you retain your humanity or descend further into the horror you have become? Prepare to explore a hidden world of political intrigue, class conflict, and decadent corruption.

Use the moonlit sky to plan your next feast and explore. Mingle among vampiric society and the humans who feed them. Uncover who can aid your new kin and whose only purpose is to be drained.

Vampirism isn't just an unholy transformation of your body-- it also threatens to transform your mind. Will you choose to indulge your empathetic humanity or embrace your newfound nihilism?

But to lure your next meal somewhere safe and secluded, you'll need to understand who they are and what they desire. A kind-hearted, alcoholic coachman? A fraying newlywed couple? A greedy, yet charming charlatan? Their lives are yours to aid or unravel.

Art, literature, history, science, these are the skills you'll require to succeed. Your knowledge will be your greatest weapon in a world where the cunning drain the brutal of life.

girlsmakegamesscholarship.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Make Games Scholarship Fund are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Make Games Scholarship Fund is a newly formed 501c3 public charity that provides need-based financial scholarships as well as mentorship to girls and young women interested in pursuing video game development summer camps, workshops and undergraduate degree programs.

ereban_shadowlegacy.description_text:
Ereban: Shadow Legacy is a fast-paced stealth platformer game where you become Ayana, the last descendant of a forgotten race. Harness mystical shadow powers, high-tech gadgets and avoid or kill to uncover the truth about your past and the key to saving a dying, morally grey universe. What will your legacy be?

Experience an unprecedented combination of stealth and shadows with the Shadow Merge ability. Dive into shadows and move freely through them to climb walls, reach inaccessible places, attack from cover or advance unseen.

Absorb echoes to learn more lethal and non-lethal shadow powers, craft high-tech gadgets, and combine all this with your agility to infiltrate Helios lines and investigate what they are hiding.

Avoid or kill. Spare or consume. The decision is yours: how far are you willing to go to uncover the truth?

Approach each level with your own style of play. Use your powers to move like a ghost or strike as a deadly shadow in this sci-fi universe where actions go beyond good and evil.

Discover the ruins of lifeless cities, infiltrate sci-fi facilities carved into ancient temples and forge alliances to unravel the mystery of who you are and what happened to your people.

environmentalambiencessoundfxpack_vol3.human_name: Environmental Ambiences Sound FX Pack Vol. 3
environmentalambiencessoundfxpack_vol3.description_text:
Transport listeners to captivating worlds with the Environmental Ambience Sound FX Pack Vol. 3 by Ovani Sound. This thoughtfully curated collection has been meticulously designed to bring depth and immersion to your projects. From bustling urban centers to fantastical realms, this pack covers a variety of atmospheric environments, perfect for enhancing video games, films, and other creative media.

With a total of 90 loops, this pack includes:

  • 28 Fantasy Loops: Enchanting atmospheres such as "Astral Space," "Mysterious Forest," and "Lost Cavern Loop" bring magic and mystery to fantastical settings.
  • 16 Industrial Loops: Gritty and mechanical ambiences including "Atomic Junkyard," "Ancient Machinery," and "Abandoned Bunker" create the perfect backdrop for dystopian or sci-fi environments.
  • 25 Nature Loops: Serene and dynamic effects like "Rain From Open Window," "Hot Springs," and "Volcano" capture the beauty and intensity of natural landscapes.
  • 11 Sci-Fi Loops: Futuristic tones such as "Warp Travel," "Hallowed Compartment," and "Eternal Static" immerse players in space exploration and high-tech scenarios.
  • 10 Urban Loops: Authentic cityscapes with "City Park," "Arcade Hall," and "Construction Site" add a realistic touch to bustling metropolitan scenes.

Elevate your environmental sound design with the Environmental Ambience Sound FX Pack Vol. 3. Each loop is carefully crafted to provide seamless integration, enhancing the realism and atmosphere of your projects.

44.1kHz/16bit

Each file is loaded with metadata tags to reduce time searching for sounds.

analoguegearsoundfxpack.description_text:
Introducing the Analogue Gear Sound FX Pack by Ovani Sound – a tactile, richly detailed collection capturing the mechanical soul of vintage and analogue equipment, from broadcasting hardware and magnetic media to tube amplifiers and precision components.

With 197 total sounds, this pack immerses you in the clicks, crackles, hums, and physical interactions of real analogue gear:

  • 26 Radio Sounds: Car radio button presses, interference bursts, and static alongside handheld radio handling, tuning sweeps, and multi-variant static layers — perfect for field communication, vintage broadcasting, and any scene where signal and noise tell the story.
  • 52 Magnetic Media Sounds: Cassette tape handling, VHS player button presses, cable connections, tape handling, vinyl player operations, record insertions, lid movements, and tube amp crackling, squealing, and power-down events — delivering the warm, imperfect character of analogue playback in all its forms.
  • 40 Lever, Crank & Trigger Sounds: Heavy and short lever flicks, double lever actions, thick flicks, full and low cranks, trigger pulls, and combined trigger-and-crank sequences built for mechanical contraptions and devices with satisfying physical resistance.
  • 60 Mechanism & Component Sounds: Sharp springs, spring buttons, dull and sharp mechanisms, component rattles, rotor machine hums, metal and plastic handling, rubber and wooden component interactions, and headphone handling — covering the full tactile range of operating physical gear.
  • 19 Cables & Specialty Equipment Sounds: Cable plugging and unplugging, watch handling, and impulse heat sealer operation for niche Foley needs rarely covered in general sound libraries.

Perfect for retro-themed games, period film and TV sound design, escape room experiences, and any project where the physical world of analogue machinery needs to feel lived-in and real.

44.1kHz / 16bit

Each file includes detailed metadata for fast implementation.

childrensmiraclenetworkhospitals.description_text:
Payments to Children's Miracle Network Hospitals are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Children's Miracle Network Hospitals raises funds and awareness for 170 member hospitals that provide 32 million treatments each year to kids across the U.S. and Canada. Donations stay local to fund critical treatments and healthcare services, pediatric medical equipment and charitable care. Since 1983, Children's Miracle Network Hospitals has raised more than five billion dollars, most of it one dollar at a time through the charity's Miracle Balloon icon.

ambientmusicpack_vol12.description_text:
Returning with Volume 12 of the Ambient Music Pack by Ovani Sound, this collection drifts deeper into expansive, unhurried soundscapes designed to fade into the background and take hold of the listener all at once. Perfect for meditative experiences, exploration-driven games, and any project that needs space to breathe.

A total of 50 music files!

With each individual track, you'll find three different intensity levels, each lasting approximately 90 seconds, along with a 30-second rough cut and a 60-second rough cut. Five different variants per track! With 10 distinct tracks, this diverse selection ensures seamless integration into your projects, providing the perfect musical backdrop.

Furthermore, our tracks offer even more value by seamlessly looping when used with our Music Integration Plugins, providing you with enhanced flexibility for your game development process.

48khz/24bit

contentcreatorsoundfxpack.description_text:
Introducing the Content Creator Sound FX Pack by Ovani Sound – a versatile, production-ready collection built for streamers, video editors, podcasters, and digital creators who need the right sound at exactly the right moment.

With 185 total sounds, this pack covers the full range of content creation audio, from authentic keyboard sessions and camera clicks to snappy transitions, UI feedback, and expressive accent sounds:

  • 63 Typing & Input Sounds: Single keystrokes, full typing sessions, and typewriter gestures spanning modern mechanical keyboards, vintage typewriters, and smartphones, paired with DSLR, mirrorless, and phone camera shutter clicks and a full set of mouse click variants for UI-accurate interactions.
  • 32 Whoosh & Transition Sounds: Deep whooshes, short whooshes, fast swishes, and digital swooshes in both standard and quick-cut variants — giving editors a full toolkit of motion sounds for cuts, slides, and on-screen movement.
  • 33 Digital, UI & Stinger Sounds: Positive and negative beeps, glitches, soft notifications, error buzzers, dramatic and heavenly reveals, risers, and fast forward and rewind cues for interface feedback, alert moments, and transitions that demand a little extra flair.
  • 57 Impact, Pop & Accent Sounds: Boings, bonks, bubble pops, wood pops, muted snaps, subtle impacts, warm chimes, shimmers, money cues, paper crumbling and ripping, whiteboard marker squeaks, dice rattles, and crickets — covering every reactive and ambient texture a content creator could need.

Perfect for YouTube editors, live streamers, podcast producers, and motion designers who need a dependable, go-to library that handles every layer of the creative workflow.

44.1kHz / 16bit

Each file includes detailed metadata for fast implementation.

successandfailuresoundfxpack.description_text:
Introducing the Success & Failure Sound FX Pack by Ovani Sound – a comprehensive feedback library covering every emotional outcome, from triumphant wins and satisfying completions to deflating losses, access denials, and all the ambiguous moments in between.

With 150 total sounds, this pack gives you a full spectrum of UI and game feedback audio across three distinct emotional registers:

  • 55 Failure Sounds: Access denied tones, bent and distorted failure cues, classic fail buzzers, a broad library of general failure sounds in multiple styles, robot failure variants, and traditional descending stingers — covering everything from a gentle miss to a full system rejection.
  • 40 Indifferent Sounds: Ambiguous tones, long and short thunks, UI-neutral clicks, and curious synth accents for moments that don't clearly win or lose — perfect for neutral confirmations, menu interactions, loading states, and outcomes that leave the player guessing.
  • 55 Success Sounds: Dial-in confirmations, dreamy chimes, short and long party horn blasts, ascending scale-ups, a large versatile success library, and traditional fanfare stingers for everything from a quiet task completion to a full victory celebration.

Perfect for games, apps, quiz platforms, and interactive experiences where clear, expressive audio feedback is the difference between a satisfying moment and a missed one.

filmmakingsoundfxpack.description_text:
Introducing the Filmmaking Sound FX Pack by Ovani Sound – a comprehensive, true-to-life collection capturing every mechanical detail of a professional film set, from camera rigs and lighting equipment to cases, cables, and editing suites.

With 241 total sounds, this pack delivers the authentic texture of filmmaking hardware across every stage of production:

  • 58 Camera & Lens Sounds: Film camera handling, bag removal, shutter clicks, continuous burst sequences, lens attachments, cap removals, ring twisting, locking actions, and lens extension and storage — covering the full physical interaction of working with a camera body and its glass.
  • 50 Lighting & Support Sounds: Film flash handling, mounting, winding, and firing alongside LED button presses, metal and heavy light flap adjustments, light-blocking frame handling, camera slider movements, tripod head turns, leg extensions, stabilizer motor whirs, and T-stand interactions.
  • 35 Film & Media Storage Sounds: Film negative and reel handling, storage, and boxing alongside SD card and pro memory card insertions and ejects — essential for any scene involving archiving, loading, or managing physical and digital media.
  • 67 Cases, Cables & Equipment Sounds: Briefcase and flight case opens and closes, jack and quarter-inch plug connections and disconnections, V-mount battery insertions, spring clamp snaps, and a full range of plug-in and plug-out variations for every type of on-set connection.
  • 31 On-Set & Editing Sounds: Clapperboard strikes, director chair creaks, hard drive reads and whirs, trackball rolls, microphone pole extensions, machine button presses, and video editing wheel clicks and turns for both production and post-production environments.

Perfect for film and TV productions, documentary sound design, behind-the-scenes content, and any creative project that wants to capture the tactile world of professional filmmaking.

instrumentsfoleysoundfxpack_vol2.human_name: Instruments Foley Sound FX Pack Vol. 2
instrumentsfoleysoundfxpack_vol2.description_text:
Returning with Volume 2 of the Instruments Foley Sound FX Pack by Ovani Sound – a sprawling, up-close collection capturing the physical life of real instruments, from the mechanical weight of a tuba's piston valves to the creak of a piano stool being dragged across tile.

With 286 total sounds, this pack covers the full tactile and performative range of orchestral, folk, and keyboard instruments:

  • 52 Brass Sounds: Clown horn honks, harmonica gestures, and an extensive tuba library spanning handling, knocking one shots and multiples, piston valve presses, and full playing performances — delivering the mechanical heft and resonance of large brass instruments from every angle.
  • 53 Mallet, Orchestra & Misc Sounds: Bell tree, glockenspiel, marimba, vibraphone, and xylophone handling and player-side interactions alongside orchestra warm-up recordings from close, distant, and stairwell perspectives, tambourine handling, felt and wood bag interactions, and instrument bag unzipping.
  • 81 Organ Sounds: A deep, multi-layered organ library spanning church and Lowrey organ key presses, switch clicks, scale playing, music stand handling, motor hums, air blowing loops, pedal engagements, and full playing performances captured from both close and distant points of view.
  • 50 Percussion Sounds: Bongo, conga, cabassa, cowbell, timpani, concert drum, castanets, flex-a-tone, sleigh bells, triangle, guiro, maracas, and temple block interactions — covering setup, handling, and performance for a wide range of hand and orchestral percussion instruments.
  • 50 String Sounds: Cello bow handling, tuning, ukulele gestures, tuning and unpacking, upright piano lid and body interactions, string strums and harmonics, worn key playing, and piano stool handling on both carpet and tile surfaces.
  • 18 Woodwind Sounds: Alto and treble recorder assembly and playing, flute assembly and bag openings, flute performances, and bassoon assembly and playing across a tight but well-rounded woodwind selection.

Perfect for orchestral game soundscapes, film and TV Foley, music-themed narratives, and any project where the physical world of live instrumentation needs to feel authentic and present.

44.1kHz / 16bit

childrensmiraclenetworkhospitals.description_text:
Payments to Children's Miracle Network Hospitals are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Children's Miracle Network Hospitals raises funds and awareness for 170 member hospitals that provide 32 million treatments each year to kids across the U.S. and Canada. Donations stay local to fund critical treatments and healthcare services, pediatric medical equipment and charitable care. Since 1983, Children's Miracle Network Hospitals has raised more than five billion dollars, most of it one dollar at a time through the charity's Miracle Balloon icon.

basic_data.human_name: Humble Comics Bundle: The Best of Joe Hill by IDW
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Find delight in the fright with our star-studded collection of Joe Hill works by IDW Publishing! Unlock 15 outstanding titles guaranteed to excite and fright. Highlighted by The Cape, a haunting story of childhood joy twisting into an adulthood of pain; Thumbprint, the tale of a broken veteran battling with the decisions of her past; and the fantasy murder mystery title Locke & Key Vol. 1: Welcome to Lovecraft, this bundle delivers an epic collection of amazing reads. Pay what you want for an epic bundle of amazing reads and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!
basic_data.description:
Hair raising-reads by Joe Hill. Find delight in the fright with our star-studded collection of Joe Hill works by IDW Publishing! Unlock 15 outstanding titles guaranteed to excite and fright. Highlighted by The Cape, a haunting story of childhood joy twisting into an adulthood of pain; Thumbprint, the tale of a broken veteran battling with the decisions of her past; and the fantasy murder mystery title Locke & Key Vol. 1: Welcome to Lovecraft, this bundle delivers an epic collection of amazing reads. Pay what you want for an epic bundle of amazing reads and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!

Pay $10 or more. Normally, the total cost for the comics in this bundle is as much as $166. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $10 purchase.

Read them anywhere. The comics in this bundle are available in PDF, and ePub formats, so they work on your computer, e-readers, iPads, cell phones, and a wide array of mobile devices! Instructions and a list of recommended reading programs can be found here.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publisher and to support BINC. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

lockeandkey_vol1_welcometolovecraft.human_name: Locke & Key Vol. 1: Welcome to Lovecraft
lockeandkey_vol1_welcometolovecraft.description_text: Acclaimed suspense novelist and New York Times best-selling author Joe Hill (Heart-Shaped Box) creates an all-new 6 issue story of dark fantasy and wonder: Locke & Key. Written by Hill and featuring astounding artwork from Gabriel Rodriguez, Locke & Key tells of Keyhouse, an unlikely New England mansion, with fantastic doors that transform all who dare to walk through them... and home to a hate-filled and relentless creature that will not rest until it forces open the most terrible door of them all...

lockeandkey_smallworlddeluxeedition.human_name: Locke & Key: Small World Deluxe Edition
lockeandkey_smallworlddeluxeedition.description_text: Three years after wrapping up their award-winning, best-selling Locke & Key saga, the team that built Keyhouse returns to Lovecraft, Massachusetts with a new tale of terror and suspense! An impossible birthday gift for two little girls unexpectedly throws open a door to a monster on eight legs! This deluxe edition contains Small World and adds a new interview with Joe Hill and Gabriel Rodriguez, a bonus art gallery, and “From Script to Page,” showing the process from Hill’s earliest hand-written draft to the final typed script and onto Rodriguez’ art boards.

lockeandkey_thegoldenage.description_text: Unlock moments from Keyhouse's long history, expanding the saga of the Locke family in this collection of stories, which includes the epic crossover with DC’s The Sandman Universe! For two hundred years, the Locke family has watched over Keyhouse, a New England mansion where reality has come unhinged and shadows are known to walk on their own. Here they have guarded a collection of impossible keys, instruments capable of unlocking both unparalleled wonder and unimaginable evil. Take a glimpse into the lives of Chamberlin Locke and his family in the early 20th century as they use the keys to fight battles big and small. From a giant spider inside Keyhouse to the killing fields of Europe during WWI and the depths of Hell, the Lockes are in a constant struggle to keep the dark forces of their world at bay. Collects three standalone tales, “Small World,” the Eisner-nominated “Open the Moon,” and the never-before-seen “Face the Music,” along with the 3-part “...In Pale Battalions Go…” and the epic 80-page crossover with The Sandman Universe, “Hell & Gone” all from the co-creators of Locke & Key, Joe Hill and Gabriel Rodríguez!

thecape_fallen.description_text: If power corrupts, then surely with great power comes even greater corruption. Writer Jason Ciaramella and artist Zach Howard uncover new folds in Hill's cautionary anti-superhero tale with a story that takes place between the scenes of the original series. Eric's already killed his ex-girlfriend and (spoiler alert) soon he'll go after his mom and brother. But first he'll go missing for three torturous days. What other atrocities will Eric commit? What violent secrets does the Cape still hide? There's no telling, but the answers to those questions will further underline The Cape's central theme—that no amount of power will make a bad person good.

developers.developer-name: Joe Hill, Jason Ciaramella, Zach Howard, Nelson Daniel

lockeandkey_heavenandearth.description_text: This special deluxe release finally collects the oft-requested and long-denied “Open the Moon!” from the GUIDE TO THE KNOWN KEYS one-shot. Plus the other long-sold-out one-shot, “Grindhouse!” PLUS plus: the even more hard-to-find IDW 10th anniversary Locke & Key tale, “In the Can!” And additional covers, behind-the-scenes photos and more, all wrapped up in a beautiful 72-page package.

thewraith_welcometochristmasland.description_text: Joe Hill's New York Times bestselling novel, NOS4A2, introduced readers to the terrifying funhouse world of Christmasland and the mad man who rules there: Charlie Talent Manx III. Now, in an original new comic miniseries, Hill throws wide the candy cane gates to tell a standalone story that is at once both accessible to new readers and sure to delight fans of the book.

developers.developer-name: Joe Hill, Charles P. Wilson III

thecape.description_text: A line has been crossed. After years of failure, Eric has finally found something he’s good at, and is determined to let the world know. The follow-up to December’s critically acclaimed, quickly sold-out one-shot, this new miniseries is again written by Jason Ciaramella and Joe Hill, with art by Zach Howard and Nelson Daniel. Explore your dark side.

developers.developer-name: Joe Hill, Jason Ciaramella, Zach Howard, Nelson Daniel

joehillsthumbprint.description_text: Private Mallory Grennan had done terrible things as an Abu Ghraib prison worker. After being discharged from the army, Mal thought she was leaving her sins behind to start a new life back home. But some things can't be left behind -- some things don't want to be left behind. By Joe Hill and Jason Ciaramella, the writing team that brought you the Eisner-award nominated one-shot, The Cape, with art by Vic Malhotra. Thumbprint will turn your guts inside out.

developers.developer-name: Joe Hill, Jason Ciaramella, Vic Malhotra

dyingiseasy.description_text: Comedy is hard... but dying is easy! From New York Times bestselling author Joe Hill (LOCKE & KEY, NOS4A2) comes this new graphic novel mystery. Meet Syd "Sh*t-Talk" Homes, a disgraced ex-cop turned bitter stand-up comic turned wanted killer! Syd's rival Carl Dixon is on the verge of comedy superstardom and he got there the dirty way: by stealing jokes. He's got a killer act, an ugly past, and more enemies than punch-lines. When he turns up dead, Syd is on the top of the suspect list... he had motive, he was the last man to see Dixon alive, and he had already named his price for taking Dixon out. Syd isn't guilty of anything but bad jokes but now he's on the run, and it'll take all of his investigative chops to nail the real killer, before the cops nail him.

bookindustrycharitablefoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Book Industry Charitable Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

For more than twenty years, the Book Industry Charitable (Binc) Foundation has helped bookstore and comic book store employees and owners who encounter unexpected financial crises. The Binc Foundation works to keep book people in their homes, in their jobs, and with their families – stabilizing the brick and mortar bookstore community. The Foundation is the only 501(c)(3) in the country dedicated exclusively to strengthening the book industry by supporting the people who work in bookstores and comics shops. Since its inception, Binc has provided more than $7 million in financial assistance and scholarships to more than 7,800+ families. Support for the Foundation’s programs and services come from all sectors of the book industry. Imagined and built by booksellers, Binc proudly continues to be their safety net.

lockeandkey_vol4.human_name: Locke & Key Vol. 4: Keys to the Kingdom
lockeandkey_vol4.description_text: Joe Hill and Gabriel Rodriguez's Locke & Key unwinds into its fourth volume in Keys to the Kingdom! With more keys making themselves known, and the depths of the Locke's family's mystery ever-expanding, Dodge's desperation to end his shadowy quest drives the habitants of Keyhouse ever closer to a revealing conclusion.

lockeandkey_vol5.description_text: The sprawling tale of the Locke family and their mastery of the whispering iron thunders to new heights as the true history of the family is revealed to Tyler and Kinsey. Zack Wells assumes a new form, Tyler and Kinsey travel through time, and surprises beyond imagination will be revealed.

thecape_1969.description_text: It’s 1969 and the war in Vietnam rages on. Captain Chase, a Medevac helicopter pilot for the US Army, is shot down over enemy territory. He and his crew are in a fight for their lives as they play a deadly game of cat and mouse with the Vietcong. We soon learn that machine guns and grenades aren’t the only scary things hiding in the jungle. Find out what happens in this origin prequel to last year’s Eisner Award-nominated hit, with story by Joe Hill and Jason Ciaramella, and art and colors by Nelson Daniel (Road Rage, The Cape). Explore your dark side.

lockeandkey_vol6.description_text: The shadows have never been darker and the end has never been closer. Turn the key and open the last door; it's time to say goodbye. Omega and Alpha, the final two storylines of the New York Times bestselling series, are collected together to offer a thunderous and compelling conclusion to Locke & Key. An event not to be missed!

lockeandkey_vol2.description_text: New York Times bestselling writer Joe Hill and artist Gabriel Rodriguez, the creators behind the acclaimed Locke & Key: Welcome to Lovecraft, return with the next chapter in the ongoing tale, Head Games. Following a shocking death that dredges up memories of their father's murder, Kinsey and Tyler Locke are thrown into choppy emotional waters, and turn to their new friend, Zack Wells, for support, little suspecting Zack's dark secret. Meanwhile, six-year-old Bode Locke tries to puzzle out the secret of the head key, and Uncle Duncan is jarred into the past by a disturbingly familiar face. Open your mind - the head games are just getting started!

lockeandkey_vol3.human_name: Locke & Key Vol. 3: Crown of Shadows
lockeandkey_vol3.description_text: The dead plot against the living, the darkness closes in on Keyhouse, and a woman is shattered beyond repair, in the third storyline of the Eisner-nominated series. Dodge continues his relentless quest to find the key to the black door, and raises an army of shadows to wipe out anyone who might get in his way. Surrounded and outnumbered, the Locke children find themselves fighting a desperate battle, all alone, in a world where the night itself has become their enemy.

bookindustrycharitablefoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Book Industry Charitable Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

For more than twenty years, the Book Industry Charitable (Binc) Foundation has helped bookstore and comic book store employees and owners who encounter unexpected financial crises. The Binc Foundation works to keep book people in their homes, in their jobs, and with their families – stabilizing the brick and mortar bookstore community. The Foundation is the only 501(c)(3) in the country dedicated exclusively to strengthening the book industry by supporting the people who work in bookstores and comics shops. Since its inception, Binc has provided more than $7 million in financial assistance and scholarships to more than 7,800+ families. Support for the Foundation’s programs and services come from all sectors of the book industry. Imagined and built by booksellers, Binc proudly continues to be their safety net.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: The Best of Joe Hill by IDW
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Dying is Easy, The Cape: Fallen, Joe Hill’s The Cape, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Find delight in the fright with our star-studded collection of Joe Hill works by IDW Publishing! Unlock 15 outstanding titles guaranteed to excite and fright. Highlighted by The Cape, a haunting story of childhood joy twisting into an adulthood of pain; Thumbprint, the tale of a broken veteran battling with the decisions of her past; and the fantasy murder mystery title Locke & Key Vol. 1: Welcome to Lovecraft, this bundle delivers an epic collection of amazing reads. Pay what you want for an epic bundle of amazing reads and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!
from_bundle.author: IDW Publishing

basic_data.human_name: Humble RPG Bundle: The World of Fateforge Megabundle by Studio Agate
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: An epic bundle of gorgeous original art, thrilling engagements, and countless hours of gameplay has arrived with Fateforge. Your adventures through this comprehensive 5th edition library will transport your party through the grandiose landscapes of Eana, filled with colorful civilizations and exotic locations like the bustling Free City. Strategize with your party to defeat the demon princes from the Melancholian Moon and the brutal barbarian lords of the Kaani Hordes to bring peace to the realm. Discover Studio Agate’s award-winning Fateforge series before it’s gone and help support the charity ComicBooks For Kids!.
basic_data.description:
A ‘love letter’ to swords & sorcery. An epic bundle of gorgeous original art, thrilling engagements, and countless hours of gameplay has arrived with Fateforge. Your adventures through this comprehensive 5th edition library will transport your party through the grandiose landscapes of Eana, filled with colorful civilizations and exotic locations like the bustling Free City. Strategize with your party to defeat the demon princes from the Melancholian Moon and the brutal barbarian lords of the Kaani Hordes to bring peace to the realm. Discover Studio Agate’s award-winning Fateforge series before it’s gone and help support the charity ComicBooks For Kids!.

Pay $15 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $595. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $15 purchase.

cartographyforencyclopedia1_setof19maps.description_text: ️ The cartography set of the world of Eana in A3 format illustrates 4 lands and 15 cities described in Book 4 Encyclopedia.

battlemap_askinos.description_text: ️ This battlemap in A2 format (16.5 × 23.4 inches), with a 28 mm / 1 inch grid  represents the den of an iconic creature of Eana: the askinos, featured in Book 3 of the Fateforge series, Creatures.

spellcastersguide.description_text: The Spellcaster's Guide contains most of the optional rules for magic developed in Fateforge Book 2 Grimoire:  • Schools of magic  • Geomagics  • Corruption  • Modular option  • ...and more 62 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

gamemasterscreen_reddragon.description_text: The three-panel Red Dragon game screen provides the game leader with a summary of the most useful rules during a Fateforge game: Skills, Rest, Actions in Combat, Conditions, etc. It's beautifully illustrated by Chane on the players' side.

battlemap_aboleth.description_text: ️ This battlemap in A2 format (16.5 × 23.4 inches), with a 28 mm / 1 inch grid  represents the den of an iconic creature of Eana: the aboleth, featured in Book 5 of the Fateforge series, Creatures 2 Netherworld.

netherworldtunnelscollectionof5shortscen.human_name: Netherworld Tunnels, collection of 5 short scenarios
netherworldtunnelscollectionof5shortscen.description_text: Far from the surface, deep into the bowels of the Netherworld, shadows shift eerily under the light of torches. In this strange land where even mushrooms seem hungry for prey, what creature may lurk beyond the next tunnel bend? 64 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

battlemap_vampirelord.description_text: ️ This battlemap in A2 format (16.5 × 23.4 inches), with a 28 mm / 1 inch grid  represents the den of an iconic creature of Eana: the vampire lord, featured in Book 3 of the Fateforge series, Creatures.

gamemasterscreen_freecity.description_text: The three-panel Free City game screen provides the game leader with a summary of the most useful rules during a Fateforge game: Skills, Rest, Actions in Combat, Conditions, etc. It's beautifully illustrated by Yvan 'Gawain' Villeneuve on the players' side.

butterflysdirgescenariomodule.description_text: Guided by nightmarish visions and tales of a dark history, adventurers answer a sinister call. Will they be able to unravel the mysteries surrounding this place caught outside of time? The party will wander among lost memories, guided by kaleidoscopes of strange, otherworldly butterflies. 48 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

setof51conditionscards.description_text: The deck of 51 Conditions cards in tarot format is a handy accessory at your table. When a player suffers a condition, they may place the corresponding card in front of them to keep track during and after combat.

intheshadowscollectionof5shortscenarios.human_name: In the Shadows, collection of 5 short scenarios
intheshadowscollectionof5shortscenarios.description_text: Deep within narrow alleyways, on black-market stalls, and sometimes right under the authorities’ nose, crimes and skulduggery are part and parcel of urban life. Do the locals truly know what hides in the shadows of those streets so familiar to them? 60 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

setof50randomevents_travelinginnetherwor.human_name: Set of 50 Random Events: Traveling in Netherworld
setof50randomevents_travelinginnetherwor.description_text: The Traveling in the Netherworld deck offers 50 incidents to enrich your campaigns in the Netherworld. These incidents are particularly suitable to bring hazards during a campaign involving underground travel.

abolethsofblackwatercollectionof5shortsc.human_name: Aboleths of Blackwater, collection of 5 short scenarios
abolethsofblackwatercollectionof5shortsc.description_text: Blackwater’s influence is subtle, its progression insidious. This makes it all the easier to see this threat as nothing more than a bygone peril, buried in unfathomable depths. And you’d better believe that’s what aberrations want you to think. 56 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

setof34familiarcards.description_text: The deck of 34 Familiars cards in tarot format will be particularly helpful to any player wishing to summon a familiar or simply tame a small animal as a pet. Each card features an illustration of a familiar with its main stats, while the back lists its skills and abilities.

setof6lairsforcreatures_vol2.human_name: Set of 6 Lairs for Creatures vol.2
setof6lairsforcreatures_vol2.description_text: The set of 6 lair art prints for Book 5 Creatures 2 Netherworld includes the following illustrations in PDF format: • Aboleth’s Lair by Edoardo Campagnolo • Beating Growth's Lair by Edoardo Campagnolo • Gardener's Lair by Edoardo Campagnolo • Pale Dragon's Lair by Edoardo Campagnolo • Queen Callithrix's Lair by Edoardo Campagnolo • Sublime dragon's Lair by Edoardo Campagnolo

gamemasterscreen_netherworld.description_text: The three-panel Netherworld edition game screen with an original color illustration by Nicola Bernardelli that provides the game leader with a summary of the useful rules and notes for a Fateforge game set in the Netherworld: Light, Senses underground, Canker and its Ravagers.

minigobblerstl.description_text: ♟️ This mini represents the Gobbler familiar described in Book 3 Creatures.

corebookadventures.description_text: Adventurers is the core book for Fateforge, a complete and augmented modular version of 5E: it covers character creation, the fundamentals of the world, game rules, and a multitude of play style options. 398 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

incidentscollectionof5shortscenarios.description_text: Many feel safer within city walls, but they should not fool themselves: urban life holds its own plots and perils. Whether in the streets of the Free City or those of Kaani towns, one must expect the unexpected. 56 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

bookofmagic_grimoire.description_text: Grimoire is an augmented 5E core rulebook focused on magic, and includes many game options to give your campaign a unique atmosphere: the Awakening, geomagics, corruption, madness, and 360 classic and original spells. 318 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

bookofmagic_grimoirecoverartworkreddrago.human_name: Book of Magic : Grimoire Cover Artwork Red Dragon Edition

cankerousinfestationcollectionof5shortsc.human_name: Cankerous Infestation, collection of 5 short scenarios
cankerousinfestationcollectionof5shortsc.description_text: In the dark tunnels of the Netherworld, the agents of a terrible entity lurk; Canker is on the prowl, looking for any opportunity to expand its influence and reach the surface, by any means necessary. 56 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

appendixforbestiary_creatures_vol1.description_text: As game masters, we have spent a lot of time poring through bestiaries, adorning them with all sorts of bookmarks and notes to keep track of the creatures that interested us and would be the stars of our next adventures. While working on Creatures, we wanted to provide game leaders with a tool making such preparation—or improvisation!—easier. 44 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

appendixforbestiary_creatures_vol2.description_text: In the Appendix for Book 5 Creatures: Netherworld, you will find many classification tables, allowing you to easily find creatures suited to your campaign, along with a reminder of all novelties introduced in Creatures 5 Netherworld. 38 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

Undertaking an apparently ordinary mission, the adventurers will delve into an ancient ruin containing the mysterious and powerful Chronolith. There, a temporal catastrophe will give the adventurers more than they bargained for and lead them to explore both the geography of this region and its various epochs! 48 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

Each card shows an illustration, a description, and a technical profile for the item.

bestiary_creatures_vol2.description_text: Creatures 2 Netherworld is the sequel to Creatures, presenting the numerous and varied denizens of the undergrounds. Both bestiary and toolbox, it can be used with the Fateforge corebooks, or in conjunction with any other 5E setting. It includes 150 new creatures, 5 playble species, feats, magic items, plot hooks, and more. 396 pages, A4 format, PDF, full color

comicbooksforkids.description_text:
Donations to support Comic Books for Kids! are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Mission
ComicBooks For Kids! has one mission. It is to provide kid-friendly comic books and coloring books to children and teens in hospitals and cancer centers across North America. In all cases, we work within the medical facility's infectious disease policies to insure hospital compliance as each shipment is custom to them.

What we aim to solve
ComicBooks For Kids! realizes that there are times that children will need to be in hospitals or cancer centers. While we cannot take away the reason that the child is in the hospital, for a period of time we can (with a comic book or coloring book) allow them to be kids again. Through the power of storytelling, kids can fight monsters and villains, become a prince or princess or thrill to the exploits of their favorite super hero. While they are reading the comic book or perhaps coloring, they forget all the reasons they are in the hospital.

Demographics and range:
ComicBooks for Kids! supports 165+ hospitals in every state of this country. We have shipped over 60.000 comic books in the last two and a half years to all demographics.

How can you help?
We are a 501(C) 3 organization as defined by the IRS. We take no compensation for what we do. We work within the comic book industry working closely with Distributors, publishers, retailers and consumers. Donations of both income and inventory are accepted. Every week, we are working with hospitals across the country to see where we can help their “kids”. Copies of comic books that we receive through donations that are inappropriate for the kids are donated to our military through our sister organization, ComicBooks For Troops. Donation receipts are provided for year-end taxes and/or inventory audit.

comicbooksforkids.description_text:
Donations to support Comic Books for Kids! are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Mission
ComicBooks For Kids! has one mission. It is to provide kid-friendly comic books and coloring books to children and teens in hospitals and cancer centers across North America. In all cases, we work within the medical facility's infectious disease policies to insure hospital compliance as each shipment is custom to them.

What we aim to solve
ComicBooks For Kids! realizes that there are times that children will need to be in hospitals or cancer centers. While we cannot take away the reason that the child is in the hospital, for a period of time we can (with a comic book or coloring book) allow them to be kids again. Through the power of storytelling, kids can fight monsters and villains, become a prince or princess or thrill to the exploits of their favorite super hero. While they are reading the comic book or perhaps coloring, they forget all the reasons they are in the hospital.

Demographics and range:
ComicBooks for Kids! supports 165+ hospitals in every state of this country. We have shipped over 60.000 comic books in the last two and a half years to all demographics.

How can you help?
We are a 501(C) 3 organization as defined by the IRS. We take no compensation for what we do. We work within the comic book industry working closely with Distributors, publishers, retailers and consumers. Donations of both income and inventory are accepted. Every week, we are working with hospitals across the country to see where we can help their “kids”. Copies of comic books that we receive through donations that are inappropriate for the kids are donated to our military through our sister organization, ComicBooks For Troops. Donation receipts are provided for year-end taxes and/or inventory audit.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: The World of Fateforge Megabundle by Studio Agate

from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: An epic bundle of gorgeous original art, thrilling engagements, and countless hours of gameplay has arrived with Fateforge. Your adventures through this comprehensive 5th edition library will transport your party through the grandiose landscapes of Eana, filled with colorful civilizations and exotic locations like the bustling Free City. Strategize with your party to defeat the demon princes from the Melancholian Moon and the brutal barbarian lords of the Kaani Hordes to bring peace to the realm. Discover Studio Agate’s award-winning Fateforge series before it’s gone and help support the charity ComicBooks For Kids!.

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

The pack includes vintage-style computers, printers, oscillographs, holographic projectors, robotic arms, control panels, and

many other props that capture the spirit of classic sci-fi engineering. Complemented by modular walls, floors, and furniture pieces,

you can easily create anything from a compact research pod to a large-scale base interior.

Features:

-Demo Map, Overview Map

-84 Optimized Meshes

-Modular Environment

-Detailed Retro Research Equipment

-Customizable Emissive Lamps & Screens

-Channel-packed Metallic/Roughness/AO

-Supports Lumen and Nanite

-Optimized for Performance"

This pack is optimized for games and real-time projects. It includes a set of intuitive

The environment has a dystopian and futuristic connotation, perfect for both horror and mystery games. The map shown is included in the package.

Finally there is a BP for the wind, which allows trees as well as bushes and grass

shelterunrealengine.description_text:
Discover the perfect environment to create immersive and atmospheric scenes with the Shelter Environment Pack. Designed for Unreal Engine, this pack offers a comprehensive collection of assets tailored for post-apocalyptic, survival, or disaster-themed projects.

Perfect for creating underground shelters, survival zones, or secluded areas in your game or simulation. The pack is versatile and adaptable, providing all the tools needed to design highly immersive environments.

Whether you’re building a story-driven experience or a dynamic gameplay setting, the Shelter Environment Pack will elevate your project with high-quality, ready-to-use assets.

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: Supreme 3 Best of Unity and Unreal Assets
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Temple (Unreal Engine), Shelter (Unreal Engine), Asian Dynasty Environment (Unity), and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Dive into the latest asset collection that offers the widest range of stylized towns, buildings, and more with The Supreme 3 Best of Unity and Unreal Assets Bundle! Save time and money by accessing this pro-quality library of 75+ asset sets. Unlock exclusive terrain-scattering tools for awesome volcanic land environments, add color with retro Pop Art living spaces, give your starfighter’s technicians a realistic sci-fi engineering bay, and so much more. Get the environmental assets you need to help bring your game to life and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before March 12th, 2027.
from_bundle.author: BEFOUR STUDIOS

basic_data.human_name: Checkmate! A Chess Games Collection
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Think classic boardgames are played out? Think again! Explore new ways to play chess with the all-new Checkmate! Bundle. Flex your mental muscles in Pawnbarian, the quick-moving, turn-based puzzle roguelike that incorporates elements of chess to create a fresh experience. Or dive into an adventure rooted in the spirit of chess like Dark Chess, the story-driven campaign against evil kings and queens. Play these and the freshest chess titles around and simultaneously help support World Central Kitchen—now that’s a power move!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 8, 2027.
basic_data.description:
We’re playing chess not checkers. Think classic boardgames are played out? Think again! Explore new ways to play chess with the all-new Checkmate! Bundle. Flex your mental muscles in Pawnbarian, the quick-moving, turn-based puzzle roguelike that incorporates elements of chess to create a fresh experience. Or dive into an adventure rooted in the spirit of chess like Dark Chess, the story-driven campaign against evil kings and queens. Play these and the freshest chess titles around and simultaneously help support World Central Kitchen—now that’s a power move!

Pay $12 or more. Normally, the total cost for the games and software in this bundle is as much as $150. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $12 purchase. Pay $12 or more to access Steam keys.

Redeem on Steam. All of the games and software in this bundle are available on Steam for Windows — and some for Mac and Linux too.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publishers and to support World Central Kitchen. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

System Requirements: HERE

wizardchess.callout: A deckbuilding chess roguelike. It combines the positioning of chess with the unit-recruitment of a deckbuilder. You navigate procedural biomes, upgrade your "pieces," and try to keep them alive (permadeath applies!).
wizardchess.description_text:
In short: WizardChess is Deckbuilding Chess . It is designed to challenge the player strategically through short runs (20-30 minutes) with gameplay that is simply to pick up, but near impossible to master !

Navigate an array of room-types - in whatever order you choose - to explore, fight, and further enhance your build. Each Biome features unique rooms, enemies, hazards, bosses, and other modifiers! Every run is procedurally generated, down to the encounters, enemies, units, statistics and even the AI.

Recruit, upgrade, sacrifice, trade and gamble your units away to create the ultimate build. But be careful! Permadeath applies to each unit. Should they fall, they're gone for good...

Position specialized units in deeply strategic turn-based combat, and use unique skills to take enemy pieces.

https://store.steampowered.com/app/1274210/WizardChess/

Love, TwoPM.

TwoPM consists of Ben Follington ( @vivavolt ) and Ricky James ( @iamonshushu ), both based in Queensland, Australia. We've been best friends for about 15 years and have been making games for almost as long. We both have jobs and can only work on games during nights and weekends so we like to build projects both patiently and strategically. Financial support of WizardChess or any of our other work will allow us to dedicate more time to game development and deliver content faster.

usurper.callout: A turn-based roguelike deckbuilder where your King is your strongest weapon. You play cards to drop units onto the board and protect your Ruler while pushing into enemy territory.
usurper.description_text:
Push your King forward to play your cards on the front lines. Stockpile your Power to afford expensive and powerful units like the Queen and Cannon.

Draft new cards, upgrade your Ruler, and choose powerful gambits to create game-breaking synergies. Build your deck YOUR way and master 4 unique Factions to become the ultimate champion.

One well-placed unit is the difference between victory and defeat. Place new units to counterattack your enemy and swing the battle in your favor. Master your strategy to defeat 13 unique bosses.

Defeat the Overlord in a roguelike campaign with 8 starting decks and 10 difficulty levels. Build your own Custom Deck and challenge other players in online multiplayer.

therookery.callout: An explosive, fast-paced chess roguelite. It focuses on "ridiculous abilities"—you can spawn queens everywhere, explode enemy pieces, or move twice in a row. It’s designed to be accessible to total beginners while punishing masters
therookery.description_text:
The Rookery offers all the army-building challenges and explosive potential of classic roguelikes with the timeless fun of chess. Your army will start meager but you will be offered many upgrades - will you go for a pawn-centric build, or try to get as many queens as possible? Will you go for the greedy options, preparing to destroy the final boss as long as you can sneak through the first act with some timely potions?

We have a very wide range of difficulty—the game can be played and won by someone who has never played chess before, while simultaneously posing a brutal challenge for accredited international masters!

Features

Each run, craft an army - collect pieces, boosts, relics and consumables to prepare for your next fight!

Each run is different. As you complete runs, you'll unlock harder levels and crazier items!

Synergize all your upgrades together to destroy even the toughest bosses!

10 different bosses with powerful, unique abilities!

5 different starting relics, leading to a wide variety of play experiences!

Over a hundred unique items and buffs!

40 different difficulty levels, backed by a tough AI that will not hesitate to exploit your weaknesses!

chessultra.callout: The "most breathtaking chess game ever made." It features stunning 4K visuals, Grandmaster-approved AI, and full VR compatibility. It’s the gold standard for a traditional, high-end chess experience.
chessultra.description_text:
Introducing the most breathtaking chess game ever made.

Chess Ultra injects the greatest strategy game of all time with a modern twist; offering the ultimate chess experience with stunning 4K visuals, Grandmaster approved AI and full VR compatibility.

  • Stunning chess sets and beautiful environments
  • 10 Grandmaster-approved AI levels
  • Intuitive, overhauled local and online multiplayer with ELO ranking system
  • Comprehensive time controls, including Classical, Blitz and Marathon, available online
  • Cross-platform online play and leaderboards
  • Spectate and compete in Official Ripstone tournaments
  • Demonstrate your skills in over 80 chess puzzles
  • Re-write the past by winning the biggest historic matches
  • Export portable game notation (PGN) for every game, locally and online
  • Full Twitch integration invites you to play against your community
  • Play in VR and immerse yourself in the Chess Ultra experience
  • In-depth tutorials to help improve your game

With full Oculus Rift and HTC Vive support, play Chess Ultra in VR for the most breathtaking chess experience to date. From the wood grains on the antique mahogany board in the library, to the luxury felt on the bottom of every chess piece; chess has never looked this good. Physically reach out to make your move and focus entirely on the game at hand.

  • Compatible with Oculus Rift and HTC Vive
  • Use Oculus Touch or Vive controllers to reach out and move the pieces
  • Immerse yourself in beautiful, ultra-realistic environments
  • Change your perspective of each environment by standing to get a better view
  • Take the most extreme chess challenge in Gomorrah. Will you survive?

worldcentralkitchen.description_text:
Donations to support World Central Kitchen are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

World Central Kitchen (WCK) is a non-profit organization addressing food insecurity during and after natural disasters and humanitarian crises, while also operating long-term programs aimed at improving livelihoods by strengthening local food ecosystems. Founded in 2010 by Chef Jose Andres following the devastating earthquake in Haiti, WCK has since served more than 8 million meals to those affected by disasters.

theouroborosking.callout: Combines the strategic depth of chess with the build variety of roguelikes. You assemble an army of "fairy" chess pieces (units with non-standard moves) and collect relics to defeat a sinister Coven.
theouroborosking.description_text:
Chess Meets Roguelike

The Ouroboros King combines the strategic depth of chess with the build variety and replayability of roguelikes. Assemble a formidable army, discover powerful relics, and buy surprising gadgets to defeat the Coven.


Conquer with Strategy

  • Build the Ultimate Army: Combine classic and new fairy chess pieces, relics that give them bonuses, and consumable items that grant you temporary advantages to create a formidable army.
  • Perfect Your Strategy: You can only move one piece per turn, so you must choose carefully. Make your troops work together to obliterate the enemy army.
  • Another Chance: If you're defeated you can go back to action on another timeline, where the path to victory will change: different map, different enemies, different rewards... in true roguelike spirit.


Key Features

  • Lots of end-game options to dial up the difficulty to insane levels.
  • Same-device multiplayer, challenge your friends to chess games with lots of unique pieces.
  • Chess-based tactics, easy to learn and hard to master.
  • 15-45 minute runs, good for a short break and also longer sessions.
  • No gatekeeping, all the content is unlocked from the start. Win or die based on your skills.
  • No need to learn any chess openings or study anything.
  • All in game text is available in English

Game inspirations: Shotgun King: Chess, The Final Checkmate, Pawnbarian, Slay the Spire, Into the Breach, 5D chess with multiverse timetravel.

Illustrations by Isaac Murgadella

chessarama.callout: A collection of 8 different chess-inspired puzzle and strategy games. One game might be a Sokoban-style puzzler, while another is a "Soccer Chess" match. It’s a massive variety pack of dioramas.
chessarama.description_text:
Chessarama is a collection of original puzzle and strategy games inspired by Chess. It reimagines chess rules and tactics using many different themes. Each game has its own set of rules, visual theme and original handcrafted challenges for you to play!

Key Features:
  • Play 8 exclusive chess-inspired games available in Chessarama;
  • Puzzle campaigns featuring 100+ levels plus 100+ unique challenges;
  • 24 exclusive Chess Figures to unlock and collect;
  • Unique art style, with beautiful dioramas;
  • Daily and Weekly Challenges;
  • Compete against each other on the leaderboards;
  • Learn chess movements, tactics and strategies through a modern video game experience;
  • Also includes “Classic Chess” for you to put your learnings into practice!
Many Chess Worlds for You to Explore!

Here are all the original games you will find in Chessarama: (1) Farm Life; (2) Dragon Slayers; (3) Street Soccer; (4) Lady Ronin; (5) Last Stand; (6) Knight Supreme; (7) Pawn Mania; (8) Soccer Chess.

Take a look at some of the Chessarama games:

In Dragon Slayer , you need to push your pawn to the end of a path in order to kill the mighty dragon. But it will not be that easy! The dragon attacks the board every time the pawn moves and every undefended piece will die.

In Lady Ronin , Chess meets Sokoban. You play with a Ronin (a chess queen) and you
need to eliminate the other pieces in order to get close to the Shogun and kill it. Pieces move like in chess, but push each other like in sokoban.

In Soccer Chess you will play a soccer match using chess pieces. You will need to think a few moves ahead if you want to break through the adversary's defenses to score a goal.

This is just some examples about how Chess can be reinvented. Welcome to Chessarama!

pawnbarian.callout: A quick-playing, turn-based puzzle roguelike. You play cards to move your hero like a chess piece on a tiny dungeon board. It’s all about "tactical density"—clearing floors of monsters using a deck of chess moves.
pawnbarian.description_text:
Pawnbarian is a turn-based puzzle roguelike with bite-sized, but challenging sessions. Play cards to control your hero like a chess piece on a tiny dungeon board, outmaneuver enemies with their assortment of tricky abilities, and become the mightiest warrior of the Chesslands!

Features
  • Use a deck of chess pieces to hack and slash through hordes of monsters.
  • Pick up the basics instantly if you're familiar with chess, or learn in minutes if you aren't.
  • Carefully plan your moves to navigate challenging, emergent tactical situations.
  • Spend treasure to upgrade your cards with additional powers.
  • Blitz through quick 15-30 minute runs - or die trying.
  • Take on the infinite post-run Gauntlet to see how long you can survive.
  • Pick from 3 characters to conquer 3 dungeons, all requiring an unique approach.
  • Progress through Chains, a series of extra difficulty modifiers.


Not Features
  • No permanent upgrades, and not much that needs unlocking. The progress and satisfaction come from your growing mastery of the game's elegant systems!
  • No complex and varied builds. The shops provide a few key decisions, but the bulk of the roguelike depth lies in how you approach the emergent combat puzzles!

darkchess.callout: THIS IS NOT CLASSIC CHESS!" It introduces Fog of War to the board. You can't see the enemy pieces unless they are in your line of sight. It includes a story-driven campaign against historical figures like Genghis Khan.
darkchess.description_text:
THE GAME

THIS IS NOT A GAME OF CLASSIC CHESS!

The Fog of War feature hides enemy armies. Dark Chess is both about quick decisions, tactical thinking and taking risks or thinking slow and scouting the unknown before taking a step into dark. Reworked and enhanced game rules will bring immense joy to die-hard chess-lovers and casual players alike. Game keeps players thrilled with unexpected moves and unforeseen attacks.


FEATURES

  • Game-changing feature of Fog of War

  • Fully narrated, story-driven campaign

  • Meet and challenge famous kings and queens

  • All-new visual chess experience

  • Customizable avatars and profiles



ADVENTURE TIME

Take a step to walk deeper into the Dark Chess single player story campaign to fight Queens and Kings of the past.

Do you dare to challenge the famous Genghis Khan , outsmart King Solomon or terrify Ivan the Terrible ? Dare to argue with Queen Elizabeth or Empress Cixi and keep the head on your shoulders? Be warned my friend, some of them will not play by the rules!

Expect the unexpected after the first move.

REWARDS & CUSTOMIZATION

Have you ever won a difficult chess duel feeling that you deserved a reward and got none? Dark Chess is going to reward you for your achievements! For every difficult puzzle you solve, difficult opponent you destroy or clever move you make, you'll be rewarded with an achievement that unlocks visuals improvements. You can customize in game avatar the way you want.

Whether you are a die-hard chess lover or a board game enthusiast, Dark Chess will appeal to anyone who loves the thrill of a chess battle.

belowthecrown.callout: A "love letter to Roguelikes and Chess" from the creators of Duskers. It’s a dungeon crawler where you use spells and tactical positioning to survive. It even features psychological tests about your relationship with your pieces.
belowthecrown.description_text:
Welcome to the Dungeon

The Emperor wants gold, and you're just the wizard to get it. Journey into the depths with a Rook, an Archer, and maybe a spell or two. Upgrade your party, learn new skills yourself, and discover what’s really going on in the darkness below. Spend the gold you find to help you survive - or risk saving it for the Emperor.

Key Features

  • Explore procedural dungeons with a variety of wizards with different abilities

  • Outwit opponents using tactical, Chess-inspired combat

  • Use powerful spells and flashy explosions to shake up the board

  • Take psychological tests and wonder why. Everything is fine!

  • Try Infinite and Random Dungeon Modes

  • Issue challenges to other players, share replays, and compete in daily challenges against the community


Chess meets Awesome

No memorizing openings, long drawn-out endgames, or stalemates. Start with 1 piece instead of 16. Cast new pieces with exciting abilities onto the board. No analysis paralysis – enemy movement stays basic until you encounter the dungeon’s bosses… Collect Undo Tokens if you need ’em, or more gold if you don’t!

You are not Alone

Post your epic victories as challenges to the community! Watch replays from top players to further improve your skills as you take on Daily Challenges in this massively single-player experience.

This is a Test

Answer simple questions based on your psychological state and relationships to your pieces as you progress through the depths of the Dungeon. Please answer openly and honestly. Your answers will not be used against you.

5dchesswithmultiversetimetravel.callout: The world's first chess variant with spatial, temporal, and parallel dimensions. You can move pieces back in time to create branching timelines. You must protect your Kings in the past, present, and "elsewhere" simultaneously.
5dchesswithmultiversetimetravel.description_text:
What is it?
5D Chess With Multiverse Time Travel the first ever chess variant with spatial, temporal, and parallel dimensions. It's the first ever chess variant with multiverse time travel!

Features
  • Sharpen your tactics by solving a collection of multiverse chess puzzles.
  • Practice against four different AI personalities, each with different strengths and styles.
  • Try out a variety of different starting positions and scenarios.
  • Play online with your friends or against strangers.
More Features
  • Learn as you go. An intuitive interface makes experiementation quick and easy.
  • Visualize how your pieces move with highly-polished diagrams and views.
Buy it!
  • Show your friends!

gambitshifter.callout: A relaxing, minimalist "cozy" puzzle game. You control a single piece and solve your way through 80+ levels. It focuses on a zen atmosphere and "shifting" your piece’s form to reach the goal.
gambitshifter.description_text:
Gambit Shifter is a cozy and chill puzzler for chess experts and novices alike.

Take control of just a single piece and traverse through levels where every move counts.
Shift your form and unlock new, varied movements as you clear your path to the enemy King!

The game includes 80+ hand-crafted levels, a focus-inspiring original soundtrack, and requires no prior chess knowledge.

Jump straight into the action with a quick, simple tutorial, and puzzle your way through 80+ unique levels, exploring gorgeous color scapes and putting your strategic skill to the test.

Discover new mechanics as you traverse through levels - from shifting platforms to secret passageways. Mix up your plan of attack and outsmart the obstacles guarding the King!
  • Play through 80+ hand-crafted levels .
  • Control a single pawn and use your cunning to defeat the King!
  • Made a mistake? You can always undo your moves!
  • Traverse a relaxing colourscape , designed for chess experts and beginners alike!
  • Hone your thoughts with our original, deep-focus soundtrack .

worldcentralkitchen.description_text:
Donations to support World Central Kitchen are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

World Central Kitchen (WCK) is a non-profit organization addressing food insecurity during and after natural disasters and humanitarian crises, while also operating long-term programs aimed at improving livelihoods by strengthening local food ecosystems. Founded in 2010 by Chef Jose Andres following the devastating earthquake in Haiti, WCK has since served more than 8 million meals to those affected by disasters.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: Checkmate! A Chess Games Collection
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Usurper, Pawnbarian, Chess Ultra, Gambit Shifter, The Ouroboros King, 5d Chess With Multiverse Time Travel, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Think classic boardgames are played out? Think again! Explore new ways to play chess with the all-new Checkmate! Bundle.
