Flex your mental muscles in Pawnbarian, the quick-moving, turn-based puzzle roguelike that incorporates elements of chess to create a fresh experience. Or dive into an adventure rooted in the spirit of chess like Dark Chess, the story-driven campaign against evil kings and queens. Play these and the freshest chess titles around and simultaneously help support World Central Kitchen—now that’s a power move!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 8, 2027.
from_bundle.author: Publishers

basic_data.human_name: Zero to Game Dev Hero - Course/Learning Bundle
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Here’s the situation: You’ve got ideas for designing the perfect video game, but you just don’t have the skills yet to make it happen. Luckily, we have just the bundle for you, chock-full of the game development software you’ve always wanted for a fraction of the price. Design whole worlds in all kinds of game genres in Unity, Godot, and Blender; take game developer practice exams for multiple engines; and learn how to 3D model environments, characters, and items completely from scratch! Everything you need to create the universes and stories you’ve always dreamed of is right here for the price of your choice, and every purchase of this bundle supports Code.org’s mission to bring computer science to students everywhere.
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: Build the games you’ve always wanted to play
basic_data.description:
Build the games you’ve always wanted to play. Here’s the situation: You’ve got ideas for designing the perfect video game, but you just don’t have the skills yet to make it happen. Luckily, we have just the bundle for you, chock-full of the game development software you’ve always wanted for a fraction of the price. Design whole worlds in all kinds of game genres in Unity, Godot, and Blender; take game developer practice exams for multiple engines; and learn how to 3D model environments, characters, and items completely from scratch! Everything you need to create the universes and stories you’ve always dreamed of is right here for the price of your choice, and every purchase of this bundle supports Code.org’s mission to bring computer science to students everywhere.

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the software in this bundle is as much as $2,000. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase. Pay $5 or more to access keys.

Redeem your keys. Keys redeemable on the Zenva website.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the developer and to support code.org. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

uvmappinginblenderforbeginners.human_name: UV Mapping in Blender for Beginners
uvmappinginblenderforbeginners.description_text:
Master texturing in Blender by learning how to use UV maps!

UV mapping - a process by which you "unwrap" a 3D model into a flat surface - offers creators an easy way to paint complex textures. You'll explore creating UV maps for different 3D objects and set them up to suit your material's needs. These skills in UV mapping will provide you with key techniques to customize your 3D graphics to your exact specifications.

This course assumes basic familiarity with Blender.

You will learn how to:

  • Apply textures to an object
  • Create UV maps for primitive shapes
  • Build models suitable for UV mapping
  • Combine techniques to unwrap complex objects
  • Export UV maps for 2D software
  • Paint textures onto a flattened UV map

buildaretro-styleplatformerinphaser4.human_name: Build a Retro-Style Platformer in Phaser 4
buildaretro-styleplatformerinphaser4.description_text:
Build a retro platformer from start to finish with Phaser 4!

Classic 2D platformers are a cornerstone of game development, beloved for their timeless gameplay and widespread influence. In this course, you'll create a retro-style platformer focusing on core features like player movement, collisions, interactive objects, and dynamic levels. These techniques will provide you with key Phaser physics essentials that you can use to expand this platformer project or apply to game projects in a variety of other genres!

You'll learn how to:
  • Master Arcade Physics and gravity
  • Build classic jump and walk actions
  • Modularize tilemap level creation
  • Detect collisions and overlaps
  • Implement efficient object pooling
  • Spawn objects at timed intervals

... and more!

unrealenginemini-projects2025edition.description_text:
Build four beginner-friendly Unreal Engine mini-games!

Unreal Engine empowers creators to bring imaginative ideas to life, making it a cornerstone tool across all genres. In this course, you’ll build a set of four mini-projects exploring concepts like UIs, physics, and core programming tenets with real-world techniques that strengthen your grasp of the editor. The practical skills you gain will give you the confidence to take the next step in your Unreal Engine journey - whether you want to build RPGs, walking simulators, FPS games, or something else.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Manipulate actor properties with scripting
  • Utilize loops for mass object spawning
  • Build a game based on physics
  • Develop an interactive UI
  • Connect player input to game mechanics
  • Apply Unreal best practices throughout

... and more!

introtopygame.description_text:
Learn to build games with Python using Pygame!

Pygame is a library that takes advantage of Python's versatility and adds easy-to-use functionality for making games. You'll explore the foundations of the Pygame land learn how to draw game windows, add visual elements, and deal with basic interactivity. These skills will give you the tools you need to expand your Python knowledge and tackle game mechanics for any genre.

Basic skills with Python are needed to take this course.

You will learn how to:

  • Set up Pygame
  • Implement game loops and clocks
  • Add shapes, lines, and colors
  • Perform transformations
  • Manage movement and collisions
  • Detect user input

... and more!

introtounrealenginegamedevelopment2025ed.human_name: Intro to Unreal Engine Game Development
introtounrealenginegamedevelopment2025ed.description_text:
Take your first step into Unreal Engine game development!

Unreal Engine stands at the forefront of professional game development, powering everything from breakout indie hits to AAA blockbusters. Through this course, you’ll get hands-on with the Unreal Editor, master core mechanics, and build simple interactive examples using the Blueprints Visual Scripting system. With these skills, you'll unlock the foundation to craft immersive experiences and pursue more advanced Unreal Engine projects.

You'll learn how to:

  • Navigate the Unreal Editor interface
  • Work with actors and game objects
  • Set up and modify level settings
  • Implement realistic physics and lighting
  • Build gameplay with visual scripting
  • Handle user interaction

... and more!

code_org.description_text:
Donations to support Code.org are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Launched in 2013, Code.org® is a non-profit dedicated to expanding participation in computer science by making it available in more schools, and increasing participation by women and underrepresented students of color. Code.org's comprehensive approach represents the vanguard of effective integration of Computer Science (CS) into the core of public school education. Our vision is that every student in every school should have the opportunity to learn computer science. We believe computer science and computer programming should be part of the core curriculum in education, alongside other science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) courses, such as biology, physics, chemistry and algebra.

makeafully-fledged3dplatformerwithunreal.human_name: Make a Fully-Fledged 3D Platformer with Unreal Engine
makeafully-fledged3dplatformerwithunreal.description_text:
Bring your own 3D platformer to life with Unreal Engine from start to finish!

3D platformers stand as classics of the gaming world, celebrated for their dynamic movement and multi-layered levels. Through this course, you’ll craft a fully-fledged 3D platformer from the ground up, building core features like animated players, collectibles, enemies, and seamless level progression. These skills will not only deepen your understanding of Unreal Engine, but give you the confidence to design original platforming experiences or evolve existing ones.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up a 3D player controller
  • Implement movement, jumping, and animations
  • Create interconnected, multi-stage levels
  • Add collectibles that track player progress
  • Design enemy behavior and obstacles
  • Develop in-game menus and UI

... and more!

comprehensiveintroductiontocprogramming.human_name: The Comprehensive Introduction to C# Programming
comprehensiveintroductiontocprogramming.description_text:
Jumpstart your programming journey with the C# language!

Developed by Microsoft, C# is a versatile and robust language powering everything from simple applications to complex software systems. In this course, you'll dive deep into C# and explore foundational programming topics - all while cementing your learning with real-world examples and exercises. By the end, you'll have the foundational knowledge to excel in web development, mobile app creation, and even game development using major frameworks like Unity and MonoGame.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up a C# development environment
  • Understand C# syntax and execution
  • Process and manipulate data
  • Store data - including with collections
  • Create efficient code with loops and methods
  • Apply fundamentals to real-world examples

... and more!

introtogodot4gamedevelopment2025edition.description_text:
Start your game development journey with Godot — the powerful, open-source game engine!

Godot is a versatile tool for 2D and 3D game development, combining beginner-friendly workflows with powerful professional features.

In this course, you'll explore the essential features of Godot by gaining hands-on experience in core development tools, 2D design, 3D environments, and coding gameplay behaviors with GDScript from start to finish.

Dive in and gain the foundations you'll need to make RPGs, survival games, and more with Godot!

You’ll learn how to:
  • Navigate the Godot editor
  • Utilize core editing tools
  • Understand Nodes and Scenes
  • Work with 2D & 3D assets
  • Script gameplay behaviors with GDScript
  • Develop a basic interactive game

... and more!

developacomplete3dplatformeringodot2025e.human_name: Develop a Complete 3D Platformer in Godot
developacomplete3dplatformeringodot2025e.description_text:
Craft a complete 3D platformer game from start to finish!

3D platformers are a staple of game design, combining engaging challenges with rewarding exploration across dynamic environments. In this course, you’ll harness the power of Godot to create a fully-fledged 3D platformer game, complete with collectible items, enemy hazards, and multiple levels. By walking through every step of development, you’ll not only build a compelling game but also gain practical experience that will equip you to tackle even more complex 3D game projects.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Set up levels using Godot's 3D tools
  • Create a responsive player controller
  • Enhance player movements with visual feedback
  • Implement collectibles with scores and effects
  • Design custom enemy behaviors
  • Build seamless level transitions

... and more!

unityminiprojectscfundamentals2025editio.description_text:
Kickstart your Unity C# journey with playable mini-projects!

Unity powers some of the world’s most popular games, and mastering its fundamentals opens doors to a wide array of creative opportunities in game development. In this course, you’ll build four mini-games - each focused on core topics like user interaction, physics, and collision detection. By completing these real-world projects, you’ll be ready to prototype your own interactive experiences, expand into more advanced Unity scripting, and create gameplay features with confidence.

You’ll learn how to:
  • Design interactive Unity user interfaces
  • Implement responsive click-based mechanics
  • Apply for loops and optimize code
  • Work with 3D textures and materials
  • Harness Unity’s physics for gameplay
  • Detect and handle collisions via code

... and more!

pythonprojects_object-orientedgame.description_text:
Master object-oriented programming techniques using Python!

Object-oriented programming (OOP) is one of the most in-demand paradigms, as it offers developers efficient and intuitive ways to organize their code. In this course, you’ll use the Python language to create a text-based escape room while exploring core techniques for working with game “objects”.

Regardless of what kind of coding projects interest you, these game and OOP foundations will prepare you to pursue any number of interactive projects with responsible habits.

This course assumes familiarity with Python.

You will learn how to:

  • Manage game projects
  • Implement different interaction types
  • Structure. store, & display item data
  • Evaluate inputs for specific answers
  • Test your games for errors
  • Consider various impacts games have

… and more!

introtogamedevelopmentwithunity2025editi.human_name: Intro to Game Development with Unity
introtogamedevelopmentwithunity2025editi.description_text:
Get started with Unity and unlock limitless game creation possibilities!

Unity is the powerful, cross-platform engine behind some of the world’s most popular games and interactive experiences. Through this course, you’ll gain a solid foundation in Unity’s core systems, essential tools, and C# scripting - empowering you to bring your creative ideas to life across any genre or platform. By learning best practices and real-world workflows from start to finish, you’ll be ready to tackle your own projects with confidence and clarity.

You'll learn how to:
  • Install and set up Unity
  • Navigate the Unity Editor interface
  • Manage and manipulate GameObjects
  • Work with lighting, physics, and more
  • Write and integrate basic C# scripts
  • Create your first interactive project

... and more!

createaspanishteachinggamewithcandmonoga.human_name: Create a Spanish Teaching Game with C# and MonoGame
createaspanishteachinggamewithcandmonoga.description_text:
Craft engaging and educational games with C# and MonoGame!

Educational games are in demand for kids and adults alike - and developers who know how to make them have a world of opportunities available. In this course, you'll develop a robust Spanish-teaching quiz game from scratch with MonoGame and explore how to integrate visual and interactive elements to make your games captivating. Empowered with these skills, you'll be ready to embark on more complex game development projects and bring innovative educational solutions to life.

You will learn how to:
  • Set up MonoGame projects
  • Develop a reusable quiz system
  • Draw images and text
  • Randomize questions and answers
  • Implement animations with Tween
  • Play SFX

... and more!

godot4mini-projects2025edition.description_text:
Learn essential game development tools through engaging Godot mini-projects!

Godot is a leading open-source game engine known for its flexibility in creating both 2D and 3D games. In this course, you'll create four practical mini-projects designed to solidify your grasp on crucial game mechanics and programming concepts. From mouse input handling to 2D physics systems and collision detection, these hands-on projects will form the foundation needed to build more complex, complete games in the future.

You’ll learn how to:
  • Implement mouse-click-driven interactions
  • Work with Godot’s physics engine
  • Detect collisions and handle responses
  • Use loops to automate complex systems
  • Create dynamic UI for player interaction
  • Communicate between scripts

... and more!

introtogamedesign.description_text:
Discover the core concepts of game design to create fun and intuitive games!

Game design is a fundamental process needed when creating any game – from the smallest platformer to the largest MMORPG. You’ll start mastering the foundations of game design by examining each core component and how they apply to real-world games. By the end, you’ll understand both why game design is important and, more crucially, how to apply the concepts to your own games and create a stunning portfolio.

You will learn how to:

  • Plan a game around a core mechanic or experience

  • Engage players by providing tangible goals

  • Structure game actions

  • Guide players through the game

  • Understand game feel and its effects

  • Show players how to play in different ways

… and more!

unityassociategamedevelopercertification.human_name: Unity Associate Game Developer Certification Practice Exam
unityassociategamedevelopercertification.description_text:
Prepare for the Unity Associate Game Developer Certification exam!

As one of the few industry-recognized credentials, Unity Certification can help boost your opportunities as a developer. You'll test your knowledge through a series of quizzes on Unity tools and the game development process - topics necessary for the Associate Game Developer Certification exam. These quizzes will both make sure you're ready for the exam and showcase your preparedness to build Unity games!

You will test yourself on:

  • Game design & industry
  • Using the Editor
  • Materials and animation
  • C# foundations
  • Physics, lighting, & audio
  • Unity Services

... and more!

introtocomputergraphics.description_text:
Unlock the secrets behind computer graphics with hands-on learning!

Computer graphics shape every digital world we experience - from 3D models to blockbuster games. In this course, you’ll dive deep into the essential concepts of how graphics are created and displayed, gaining a clear understanding of the theory and code that power every pixel. By building a mini rendering engine using C# and OpenTK, you’ll truly grasp how images are brought to life in real-world applications and expand your horizons in building custom graphics solutions.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up OpenTK for C# graphics
  • Explore the graphics pipeline’s stages
  • Transfer geometry to the GPU efficiently
  • Write and apply GLSL shaders
  • Manage graphical data flow
  • Render and animate custom graphics

... and more!

unityassociateprogrammercertificationpra.human_name: Unity Associate Programmer Certification Practice Exam
unityassociateprogrammercertificationpra.description_text:
Practice for the Unity Associate Programmer Certification exam!

Unity Certification can open new doors of opportunity, so making sure you’re ready for the exam is vital to getting industry-recognized credentials. You’ll take a series of quizzes aimed at testing your knowledge of C#, asset management, and more to pass the Associate Programmer Certification exam. These quizzes will ensure you’re not only ready to pass the exam but are able to program a variety of Unity and C# projects!

Extensive skills with Unity and C# are needed to take this course.

You will test yourself on:

  • Using Unity Components

  • Debugging techniques

  • UI systems

  • C# fundamentals

  • Managing scenes & assets

  • Practical programming applications

… and more!

makeafully-fledged2dactionrpgindefold.human_name: Make a Fully-Fledged 2D Action RPG in Defold
makeafully-fledged2dactionrpgindefold.description_text:
Build your own 2D action RPG from start to finish in Defold!

Action RPGs remain a cornerstone genre in game development, challenging creators to bring together exciting combat and immersive systems. In this course, you’ll create a top-down action RPG project where the player must survive and shoot a barrage of randomly spawned enemies. These skills will empower you to tackle more advanced game mechanics in Defold, and serve as the perfect springboard to designing your games with action-based gameplay in mind.

You’ll learn how to:
  • Implement player movement and controls
  • Create a dynamic camera with boundaries
  • Build simple enemy AI behaviors
  • Add health bars that follow entities
  • Structure levels with scenes and menus
  • Spawn enemies and projectiles in-game

... and more!

introtogamedevelopmentwithgamemaker.human_name: Intro to Game Development with GameMaker
introtogamedevelopmentwithgamemaker.description_text:
Learn to create your own 2D games with GameMaker!

GameMaker is one of the most popular engines available, featuring beginner-friendly architecture and cross-platform capabilities. In this course, you'll explore the fundamentals of working with GameMaker's tools while building a complete but simple game where the player must dodge an increasing number of projectiles to survive. These skills will provide you the foundations you need to start working with GameMaker in general and prepare you to build any sort of game you can imagine.

No prior experience is needed for this course!

You will learn how to:

  • Work with sprites, audio, & objects
  • Create and design 2D levels
  • Implement movement & collisions
  • Understand the eventing system
  • Code with GameMaker Language (GML)
  • Add UI elements

... and more!

makeafarmingrpgfromscratchwithdefold.human_name: Make a Farming RPG from Scratch with Defold
makeafarmingrpgfromscratchwithdefold.description_text:
Build a farming RPG from start to finish in Defold!

Farming RPGs are incredibly engaging projects that blend different genre game mechanics with the joy of creation and management. In this course, you’ll develop a farming RPG while focusing on implementing core gameplay features such as crop farming, day progression, and player controls. These hands-on skills will enable you to create more complex and ambitious projects in the future and teach you advanced methodologies for working with sprites.

A basic understanding of Defold and Lua is needed for this course.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up a player controller
  • Create and manage crop systems
  • Implement day progression
  • Work with sprite atlases
  • Utilize techniques for data management
  • Design interactive UI elements

... and more!

learnphaser4bymakingagame.human_name: Learn Phaser 4 by Making a Game
learnphaser4bymakingagame.description_text:
Master 2D cross-platform development with Phaser 4!

Phaser is a powerful, open-source framework that allows you to build 2D games once and deploy them across any modern web browser. Through this course, you'll build a simple road crossing game from start to finish - all while exploring image rendering, collisions, gameplay loops, and more. These foundational skills will empower you to take your first steps with Phaser and develop your own unique browser-based games.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up Phaser 4 projects
  • Create and manipulate game objects
  • Implement player input and movement
  • Detect and handle object collisions
  • Define win and lose conditions
  • Manage scenes and transitions

... and more!

uiuxforgamedesign.description_text:
Discover UI and UX design principles for games!

The user interface and user experience play a critical role in communicating information to players and creating smooth, interactive gameplay. In this course, you'll build a UI/UX mockup for a mobile game while exploring design methodologies and wireframing techniques. These techniques will provide you new ways to approach UI/UX game design and to meaningfully apply iterative design to optimize your game's experience.

You will learn how to:

  • Understand users with user stories
  • Create definitive design criteria
  • Utilize wireframes for mockups
  • Apply common design conventions
  • Test and iterate design choices
  • Recognize design processes

... and more!

buildacomplete2dplatformerindefold.human_name: Build a Complete 2D Platformer in Defold
buildacomplete2dplatformerindefold.description_text:
Create your own 2D platformer game with Defold!

Platformers are not only an ever-enduring genre, but a great choice for developers looking to make their first fully-fledged game. In this course, you’ll build a complete platformer game from start to finish with multiple levels, enemies, and collectables. These skills will expand your knowledge of Defold and Lua and teach you essential mechanics that can be used for your own platformer projects - as well as other genres!

A basic understanding of Defold and Lua is needed for this course.

You'll learn how to:
  • Create and manage tilemaps
  • Design player controllers with animations
  • Implement coin collectables
  • Customize enemy behavior
  • Add sound effects
  • Manage gameplay flow

… and more!

explorestorytellingforgames.description_text:
Discover tips and techniques for designing game narratives! You'll learn by studying real games, and master a variety of methods for telling stories through characters, plots, mechanics, and more.

No matter what type of games you want to build, the skills you'll learn will help to make your games more immersive and engaging for your players.

You will learn how to:
  • Understand technical story design
  • Create compelling protagonists & antagonists
  • Base your story on a three-act structure
  • Use game-based methods to convey your story
  • Incorporate interactive, choice-based storytelling
  • Advance the story with quests

learn3dmodelingwithblenderfromscratchnew.human_name: Learn 3D Modeling with Blender from Scratch
learn3dmodelingwithblenderfromscratchnew.description_text:
Master the foundations of Blender and 3D modeling!

3D modeling, the process of creating digital 3D objects, is a robust field of study with real-world applications for animation, game development, and more. In this course, you'll explore the free and open-source Blender software and learn the fundamental techniques for manipulating meshes and creating custom assets. These skills will form the basis for expanding your 3D modeling skills and open up opportunities to create unique assets for your projects.

No prior experience is needed for this course.

You will learn how to:

  • Understand how 3D objects work
  • Move, rotate, and scale objects
  • Edit vertices, edges, and faces
  • Work with Blender's modifiers
  • Apply materials to meshes
  • Export models for other programs

... and more!

createyourfirst3dgameinunity2026edition.human_name: Create Your First 3D Game in Unity (2026 Edition)
createyourfirst3dgameinunity2026edition.description_text:
Build a complete 3D platformer in Unity from start to finish!

As a foundational genre that has delighted players for decades, 3D platformers offer some of the best real-world opportunities for aspiring developers to master core mechanics. Through this course, you'll develop a fully-fledged 3D platformer with all the fundamental systems that make these games so engaging. These skills will not only give you a finished Unity game for your portfolio but also provide a comprehensive framework for designing your own unique 3D levels and gameplay challenges.

You'll learn how to:
  • Process player input
  • Implement physics-based movement
  • Create enemies and collectibles
  • Set up character animations
  • Build multiple game levels
  • Manage scene loading and transitions

... and more!

3daction-adventuregameingodot_unit3_worl.human_name: 3D Action-Adventure Game in Godot - Unit 3 - World
3daction-adventuregameingodot_unit3_worl.description_text:
Create fully-fledged 3D levels in Godot!

Action-adventure games hinge on immersive environments, and creating compelling levels is a crucial skill for any game developer. In this course, you'll create two distinct 3D levels - an overworld imported from Blender and a modular castle built with Godot's grid maps - while enhancing them with custom shaders for water, grass, and lava to blend functionality with visual appeal. By the end, you’ll have the skills to complete your own fully-fledged action-adventure game, ready to expand into more complex 3D projects.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Use 3D models from Blender
  • Create modular levels with grid maps
  • Build shaders for water, grass, & lava
  • Implement level transition systems
  • Add environmental variety for player immersion
  • Implement item pickups

... and more!

buildacompletestealthgamewithunrealengin.human_name: Build a Complete Stealth Game with Unreal Engine
buildacompletestealthgamewithunrealengin.description_text:
Create a fully-fledged 3D stealth game!

Stealth gameplay is a cornerstone of modern action and adventure games, known for its tense strategies and immersive experiences. In this course, you'll build a complete stealth combat game in Unreal Engine, focusing on advanced enemy AI and dynamic stealth mechanics. With these skills, you'll be ready to specialize further in AI-driven design and tackle complex, real-world Unreal Engine projects in multiple genres.

You'll learn how to:
  • Design advanced enemy patrol systems
  • Implement field of view mechanics
  • Integrate real-time sound detection
  • Build stealth and combat gameplay
  • Set up character and enemy animations
  • Construct game levels efficiently

... and more!

introtoriggingmodelsinblender.human_name: Intro to Rigging Models in Blender
introtoriggingmodelsinblender.description_text:
Prepare your 3D models for animation!

Rigging is an important technique for 3D animation by which one creates a skeletal-like armature that can be manipulated to move parts of the 3D mesh around. You’ll discover everything required for rigging – from setting up the “bones” to weight painting and controlling which parts of the mesh are affected by each bone.

By the end, you’ll have the foundations you’ll need to master rigging any kind of 3D model and expand your skills in creating custom assets.

You will learn how to:

  • Create bones to build an armature

  • Connect your armature and 3D mesh

  • Control affected vertices with weight painting

  • Export rigged models

  • Apply Mixamo animations to your models

first-personexplorationgameinunrealengin.human_name: First-Person Exploration Game in Unreal Engine (2026 Edition)
first-personexplorationgameinunrealengin.description_text:
Build a fully-fledged first-person exploration game using Unreal Engine!

First-person exploration games captivate players by immersing them in interactive worlds, where storytelling and discovery are at the core of the experience. In this course, you’ll develop a modular first-person exploration game inside Unreal Engine, mastering key systems that empower you to craft compelling puzzles, environments, and interactive stories. By the end, you’ll possess reusable tools and in-depth techniques to bring a wide range of first-person games to life.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up a first-person controller
  • Develop versatile interaction systems
  • Create dynamic door and object logic
  • Display info boxes for storytelling
  • Implement Blueprints for rapid iteration
  • Integrate assets for immersive worlds

... and more!

createyourfirst2dgameinunity2026edition.human_name: Create Your First 2D Game in Unity (2026 Edition)
createyourfirst2dgameinunity2026edition.description_text:
Build your first fully-fledged 2D Unity game step by step!

2D platformers continue to shape the world of indie and classic games, making them a must-learn genre for every aspiring developer. In this course, you’ll construct a 2D platformer from start to finish using Unity, covering essential topics like input controls, enemy AI, collectibles, and level management. By mastering these concepts, you’ll be ready to customize, expand, and design your own platforming experiences - as well as apply key techniques to future 2D game projects.

You’ll learn how to:
  • Set up and slice sprite sheets
  • Implement player movement and input
  • Work with 2D physics and collisions
  • Add animations, sounds, UIs, and more
  • Design multi-level worlds with tilemaps
  • Manage scoring systems

... and more!

createacomplete2dactionrpgingamemaker.human_name: Create a Complete 2D Action RPG in GameMaker
createacomplete2dactionrpgingamemaker.description_text:
Craft a complete 2D Action RPG with GameMaker!

2D Action RPGs captivate players through their intricate combat mechanics and immersive worlds - making them a popular choice for both developers and gamers. In this course, you'll develop a feature-rich action RPG from start to finish with diverse mechanics such as enemy AI, player-controlled combat systems, and more. By the end of this course, you'll not only have a fully-fledged action RPG but also possess the skills to craft increasingly complex RPGs in GameMaker.

You will learn how to:

  • Control player movement via keyboard
  • Implement a robust inventory system
  • Develop engaging enemy AI behavior
  • Add particle effects, sounds, and animations
  • Craft a multi-weapon combat system
  • Leverage tilesets for level design

... and more!

createavirtualpetgamewithphaser4.human_name: Create a Virtual Pet Game with Phaser 4
createavirtualpetgamewithphaser4.description_text:
Build a virtual pet game from scratch with Phaser 4!

Virtual pet games are beloved for their blend of nurturing, interaction, and real-time management. In this course, you’ll develop a complete, interactive virtual pet game from scratch using Phaser 4 - all while covering a variety of interaction systems that bring your virtual pet game to life. By mastering these techniques, you’ll be ready to design your own complex simulation games, expand your virtual pet with new features, or create polished interactive experiences in any genre!

You’ll learn how to:
  • Work with sprite sheets efficiently
  • Animate characters and objects
  • Implement drag-and-drop mechanics
  • Build responsive, interactive UI buttons
  • Create timed events and stat systems
  • Manage scenes and transitions smoothly

... and more!

intermediatepython_virtualpetwithpygame.human_name: Intermediate Python - Virtual Pet with Pygame
intermediatepython_virtualpetwithpygame.description_text:
Craft a virtual pet game with Python and Pygame!

Virtual pets are a popular stress-relief genre that allow players to engage with risk-free pet care. You'll work with the Pygame library and create a simple pet game with basic care options and needs system for the pet. These techniques will both enhance your skills with Python and give you new tools to create fun or educational games to play.

Basic skills with Python are needed to take this course. Pygame skills are also helpful, but optional.

You will learn how to:

  • Use project management techniques
  • Create item and pet objects
  • Control mouse click interactions
  • Implement movement and collisions
  • Add "decay" to pet needs
  • Set up end game criteria

... and more!

3daction-adventuregameingodot_unit1_char.human_name: 3D Action-Adventure Game in Godot - Unit 1 - Characters
3daction-adventuregameingodot_unit1_char.description_text:
Build an epic 3D action-adventure game from start to finish!

Action-adventure games, with their immersive gameplay and dynamic challenges, are a staple of modern gaming. Through this course, you'll explore the basics of creating characters in Godot - developing smooth animations, dynamic combat mechanics, and randomized enemies to bring your game to life. By mastering these techniques, you’ll be ready to expand into creating other 3D genres with confidence and add more advanced features to your action-adventure project.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Design and configure a 3D character
  • Animate actions with Godot’s animation trees
  • Add multiple weapons and shields
  • Generate enemies with random appearances
  • Program player combat mechanics, including defending
  • Work with inheritance for cleaner code

... and more!

3daction-adventuregameingodot_unit2_inve.human_name: 3D Action-Adventure Game in Godot - Unit 2 - Inventory
3daction-adventuregameingodot_unit2_inve.description_text:
Master advanced inventory systems for 3D action-adventure games in Godot!

Inventory systems are a cornerstone of action-adventure games, enhancing player engagement by providing seamless item management and customization options. Through this course, you'll construct a complete inventory system from start to finish, enabling players to select weapons, shields, and style items with a dynamic 3D preview. These skills will empower you to develop robust inventory management for immersive game worlds.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Build dynamic UI layouts with Godot
  • Create inventory systems for equippable items
  • Implement 3D item preview functionality
  • Work with anchors, containers, and layout nodes
  • Develop interactivity using GDScript logic
  • Add visual enhancements to improve aesthetics

... and more!

intermediatepython_learnpygamebymakingag.human_name: Intermediate Python - Learn Pygame by Making a Game
intermediatepython_learnpygamebymakingag.description_text:
Learn Python and Pygame by building a game!

Using Pygame, a set of Python modules designed specifically for game development, you'll learn techniques for player movement, enemy collisions, adding graphics, and more - all while creating a simple road-crossing game. By the end, you'll have a grasp on fundamental skills for future game projects using Pygame and real-world Python applications!

This course assumes basic familiarity with Python programming.

You will learn how to:

  • Implement basic game window functionality
  • Draw images to the screen
  • Create player and enemy object classes
  • Listen for key presses to control movement
  • Detect collisions between objects
  • Control gameplay flow with winning and losing

createamicroturn-basedrpgingodot2025edit.human_name: Create a Micro Turn-Based RPG in Godot
createamicroturn-basedrpgingodot2025edit.description_text:
Develop a micro turn-based RPG from start to finish using Godot!

Turn-based RPGs are a cornerstone of game development, offering engaging mechanics based on strategic decision-making and rewarding gameplay loops. In this course, you'll build a visually engaging micro turn-based RPG in Godot where players face off against an AI opponent in tactical combat. These skills will enable you to tackle more advanced game projects, design fully-fledged RPG experiences, and refine your programming expertise in Godot.

You’ll learn how to:
  • Design a turn-based combat system
  • Create custom player and AI actions
  • Implement AI decision-making with variables
  • Incorporate menus and game UI mechanics
  • Add game feel with visual and audio polish
  • Finalize a complete, playable project

... and more!

learngamedevelopmentwithdefoldfromscratc.human_name: Learn Game Development with Defold from Scratch
learngamedevelopmentwithdefoldfromscratc.description_text:
Master Defold - a free and powerful game engine for building 2D & 3D games!

Defold is a rising star in game development, providing developers a quick and easy way to build games for PC, mobile, and consoles with a single project. Through this course, you'll explore the foundations of the Defold game engine from start to finish - including how to work with Lua scripting to program your game logic. These skills will give you the building blocks for developing your dream games with Defold and set you up for success in other genres.

You will learn how to:
  • Navigate the Defold engine
  • Manipulate sprites
  • Work with player input
  • Script with Lua fundamentals
  • Understand the game camera
  • Combine skills in a mini-project

... and more!

code_org.description_text:
Donations to support Code.org are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Launched in 2013, Code.org® is a non-profit dedicated to expanding participation in computer science by making it available in more schools, and increasing participation by women and underrepresented students of color. Code.org's comprehensive approach represents the vanguard of effective integration of Computer Science (CS) into the core of public school education. Our vision is that every student in every school should have the opportunity to learn computer science. We believe computer science and computer programming should be part of the core curriculum in education, alongside other science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) courses, such as biology, physics, chemistry and algebra.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: Zero to Game Dev Hero - Course/Learning Bundle
from_bundle.short_marketing_blurb: Build the games you’ve always wanted to play
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Intro to Pygame, Intro to Game Design, UI/UX for Game Design, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Here’s the situation: You’ve got ideas for designing the perfect video game, but you just don’t have the skills yet to make it happen. Luckily, we have just the bundle for you, chock-full of the game development software you’ve always wanted for a fraction of the price. Design whole worlds in all kinds of game genres in Unity, Godot, and Blender; take game developer practice exams for multiple engines; and learn how to 3D model environments, characters, and items completely from scratch! Everything you need to create the universes and stories you’ve always dreamed of is right here for the price of your choice, and every purchase of this bundle supports Code.org’s mission to bring computer science to students everywhere.
from_bundle.author: Zenva Pty Ltd

basic_data.human_name: Humble Tech Book Bundle: Python Programming by Wiley
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Build websites and software, automate tasks, analyze data, and more using Python—the star of our latest Tech Book Bundle with Wiley. Get building-block courses like The Python Book and a massive collection from the For Dummies series like Python for Data Science For Dummies, 3e and Python Essentials For Dummies. Python’s easy-to-use interface is approachable yet powerful enough to tackle a wide range of complex tasks. Everything you need to dip your toes into programming languages is here in one bundle—pay what you want and help support the Python Foundation with your purchase!
basic_data.description:
Learn Python from the experts. Build websites and software, automate tasks, analyze data, and more using Python—the star of our latest Tech Book Bundle with Wiley. Get building-block courses like The Python Book and a massive collection from the For Dummies series like Python for Data Science For Dummies, 3e and Python Essentials For Dummies. Python’s easy-to-use interface is approachable yet powerful enough to tackle a wide range of complex tasks. Everything you need to dip your toes into programming languages is here in one bundle—pay what you want and help support the Python Foundation with your purchase!

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $790. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase.

Read them anywhere. The ebooks in this bundle are available in PDF and ePub formats, so they work on your computer, e-readers, iPads, cell phones, and a wide array of mobile devices! Instructions and a list of recommended reading programs can be found here.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publisher and to support Python Foundation. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

professionalpython.description_text: Python provides many tools and constructs for writing advanced but concise and maintainable code. However, many Python programmers are unfamiliar with how to use them. The purpose of this book, therefore, is to give beginning and intermediate-level Python programmers the ability to write better architected and easier to understand applications by introducing widely applicable language constructs that are relatively easy to adopt and result in more robust and efficient applications. The book covers a set of advanced Python functions, classes, and libraries, including: Decorators Context Managers Generators Magic Methods / Overloading Class Factories Metaclasses Strings and bytestrings Regular Expressions (re) The author also covers advanced tools for both developing and testing Python apps, including: Unit Testing CLI tools (optparse) asyncio (Python 3.4 only) For each topic, the author will: introduce the language constructs and libraries conceptually: i.e., explaining the what explain why the construct can be useful, and importantly when (and when not) to use it show how to code solutions using these constructs against real-world scenarios This book will, when versions of Python diverge, provide implementation details for both, but for the most part will take a "Python 3 first" approach to ensure the book remains relevant for a long time. It will also promote the use of six (http://pythonhosted.org/six/) for a single-source implementation where possible.

pythonsoftwarefoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Python Software Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The mission of the Python Software Foundation is to promote, protect, and advance the Python programming language, and to support and facilitate the growth of a diverse and international community of Python programmers. The majority of the PSF's work is focused on empowering and supporting people within the Python community. The PSF has active grant programs that support sprints, conferences, meetups, user groups, and Python development efforts all over the world. In addition, the PSF underwrites and runs PyCon US, the primary Python community conference. Being part of the PSF means being part of the Python community. Recently we changed the PSF to an open membership organization, so that everyone who uses and supports Python can join. To learn more, visit https://www.python.org/psf/membership.

visualstudiocodeforpythonprogrammers.human_name: Visual Studio Code for Python Programmers
visualstudiocodeforpythonprogrammers.description_text: Visual Studio Code for Python Programmers helps Python developers become not just familiar, but productive in Visual Studio Code. It starts with an introduction to the editing features of the workspace and continues with the more advanced functionality (including refactoring and key bindings). The book finishes with an extensive look at the integration that Visual Studio Code provides to external tool, like Git, Grunt, Gulp and NPM. For developers, the choice of an editor is a very personal one. There is a demand for speed, functionality and personalization in order to be considered. But there are also idiosyncratic functions that are considered deal breakers when it comes to choosing a tool. And they are different for each developer. After introducing the cross-platform nature of the tool, along with the steps to install Visual Studio Code on Windows, Mac and Linux platforms, the book covers such topics as: The Workspace--The focal point of the development experience. Introduces the developer to the features of the workspace and how those features can be customized. Files, Folders and Projects--The structure of a web project can be quite fluid. Visual Studio Code allows developers to choose their structure according to their needs. Looks at the different ways Visual Studio Code supports the most common structures. Editing Code in Your Language of Choice--This is the heart of the developer experience and probably the most important topic in the book. It covers syntax coloring, IntelliSense, refactoring, and code navigation. Integrating with Source Control--Visual Studio Code supports Git integration out of the box. Learn how to perform common Git functions (commits, checkouts, branches, and merges) from within Visual Studio Code. Debugging Code--Visual Studio Code is not just a code editor. Also supports many of the debugging features to which Python developers have become accustomed. Looks at how to debug your code using JSON. The book is organized in three parts--Part I, Getting Started, Part II, Python Extension Essentials, and Part III, Real World Applications. This final section will step you through Building a simple notes app with Django; Building a simple blog with Flask; Visualizing climate change data in a Jupyter Notebook; Containerizing a Python app with Docker; and Deploying a function triggered by a timer to Azure

pythonall-in-onefordummies3rdedition.description_text: Your one-stop source to answers for your Python questions There's almost no type of project that Python can't make better. From creating apps to building complex web sites to sorting big data, Python provides a way to get the work done. Python All-in-One For Dummies, 3rd Edition offers a starting point for those new to coding by explaining the basics of Python. Experienced coders looking for more than the basics can also find how Python can be applied to projects in the enterprise, including data analysis and other major undertakings. Updates include: GitHub CoPilot (AI that writes Python code) CPython optimization for faster code execution New typing features

hands-onaitradingwithpythonquantconnecta.human_name: Hands-On AI Trading with Python, QuantConnect, and AWS
hands-onaitradingwithpythonquantconnecta.description_text: Hands-On AI Trading with Python, QuantConnect, and AWS explores real-world applications of AI technologies in algorithmic trading. It provides practical examples with complete code, allowing readers to understand and expand their AI toolbelt. Unlike other books, this one focuses on designing actual trading strategies rather than setting up backtesting infrastructure. It utilizes QuantConnect, providing access to key market data from Algoseek and others. Examples are available on the book's GitHub repository, written in Python, and include performance tearsheets or research Jupyter notebooks.

pythonprojects.description_text: Many new Python coders complain of going from basic tutorials to actually making projects; there's no intermediate place for them to start. Open-source projects may seem daunting or too complex, and while they want to code, they just dont know WHERE to use Python, or HOW most people use Python. No book walks people through a basic set up of an app, or library, and making and packaging a library. Python Projects is for those who have done the typical tutorials online, know the syntax and the basic lay of the land when it comes to Python, but are looking for how to actually apply that knowledge. It shows how Python can help to complete daily tasks, make life easier, and bring efficiency to businesses. Python Projects includes: How Python works in the real world (its all libraries, which help to bring in functionality that one needs on projects the book outlines this and explains in detail how it all works) How to use libraries, where to get them, the best practices for using and utilizing them in projects Setting up development environments (using virtualenv, pip, etc) How to create, package and share libraries with the community Examples of how libraries can be used to build projects in a layered way adding function at each iteration. The reader should be familiar with the basic syntax of the core Python language and the fundamental concepts of programming (variables, data types, loops, branching, modularity, etc) and have skills creating/managing files and folders, using command line tools.

pythonforcybersecurity_usingpythonforcyb.human_name: Python for Cybersecurity: Using Python for Cyber Offense and Defense
pythonforcybersecurity_usingpythonforcyb.description_text: This book provides a structured, hands-on introduction to using Python for cybersecurity. With the MITRE ATT&CK framework as a guide, readers will explore the lifecycle of a cyberattack and see how Python code can be used to solve key challenges at each stage of the process. Each application will be explored from the perspective of both the attacker and the defender, showing how Python can be used to automate attacks and to detect and prevent them. By following the MITRE ATT&CK framework, this book explores the use of Python for a number of cybersecurity uses cases, including: Intelligence collection Exploitation and lateral movement Persistence and privilege escalation Command and control Extraction and encryption of valuable data Each use case will include ready-to-run code samples and demonstrations of their use in a target environment. Readers will gain hands-on experience in applying Python to cybersecurity use cases and practice in creating and adapting Python code to address novel situations.

adventuresinpython.description_text: Adventures in Python is the perfect book for young people who want to learn how to program but need a little heads-up on where to begin. The Adventures series has been specifically designed to appeal to young people as they begin their adventures with technology, with a layout that will appeal to school age students and carefully tailored projects which allow them to learn while having fun. Based on 9 fun projects that start at the most rudimentary level of how to get hold of Python and set it up for use, the book assumes no previous computing knowledge and explains concepts other books presume that the reader will already know. Through the projects, the young reader will pick up knowledge of Python and, more importantly, to understand the basic programming and concepts that they can then apply to other projects and languages. Each chapter will be accompanied by a video that will back up the lessons from the project and ensure the reader has all the support they need. Authored by Python expert and teacher Craig Richardson, Adventures in Python is written specifically for the self-teaching 11- to 15-year old who wants to learn how to program.

artificialintelligenceprogrammingwithpyt.human_name: Artificial Intelligence Programming with Python: From Zero to Hero
artificialintelligenceprogrammingwithpyt.description_text: Artificial Intelligence, or AI, is no doubt one of the hottest buzz words at the moment. AI has penetrated into many aspects of our lives. To know AI and to be able to use AI will bring enormous benefits to our work and life. However, to learn AI is a daunting task for many people, largely due to the complex mathematics and sophisticated coding. This book aims to demystify AI and teach readers about AI from scratch, by using simple, plain, languages and simple, illustrative, code examples. This book is divided into three parts.In part one, readers will follow an easy to read introduction about AI, including the history, the types of AI, the current status and possible future trend. It then introduces Python, A widely used programming tool for AI. In part two, we introduce Machine Learning aspect of AI, topics include classifications, regressions, and Clustering. It also includes the most popular Reinforcement Learning. In part three, it introduces Deep Learning aspect of AI, topics include Image Classifications, Transfer Learning, Recurrent Neural Network, and the latest Generative Adversarial Networks. It also includes the state of the art of GPU, TPU, cloud computing and edge computing.This book is packed with interesting and exciting examples such as pattern recognitions, image classifications, face recognition (most controversial), age and gender detection, voice/speech recognition, chatbot, natural language processing, translation, sentiment analysis, predictive maintenance, finance and stock price analysis, sales prediction, customer segmentation, biomedical data analysis and much more.

testing_python_unit_testing_tdd_bdd_acce.human_name: Testing Python: Applying Unit Testing, TDD, BDD and Acceptance Testing
testing_python_unit_testing_tdd_bdd_acce.description_text: Testing Python teaches you how to use Unit Testing and Test-Driven Development to build clean, flexible Python programs that work in an Enterprise environment. Python's dynamic nature and vast range of external libraries make it a great choice for developers, but they also make it natural fit for Unit Testing and TDD.   Learn about:         * Unit testing and unit test tools         * Testable documentation         * Test-driven development         * Acceptance testing and acceptance testing tools         * Performance testing         * Looking after Lint         * Continuous testing         * Smoke testing

machinelearningfortimeseriesforecastingw.human_name: Machine Learning for Time Series Forecasting with Python
machinelearningfortimeseriesforecastingw.description_text: One of the most important elements of todays decision-making world, in both the public and the private sectors, is the forecasting of macroeconomic and financial variables. This applies to many industries including finance, education, and health care to name just a few. However, not many business analysts or developers people know how to use machine learning approach and technologies to build successful forecast applications. This book provides a practical introductory guide to time series forecasting with machine learning and Python for those hands-on readers. Readers new to time series forecasting will be able to understand and deal better with: Time series forecasting concepts, such as horizon, frequency trend and seasonality. Evaluation of the time series forecasting models performance and accuracy. Understanding when to use neural networks instead of traditional time series models in time series forecasting.   The book shows readers practical instances of how these time series forecasting models can be applied to a real-world scenario by providing examples and using many machine learning components available in open-source Python packages, such as Scikit-learn, Keras and Tensorflow. The reader will also use other Python tools such as Jupyter notebooks to interactively explore data, transform it, and then develop time series forecasting models.

beginningprogrammingwithpythonfordummies.human_name: Beginning Programming with Python For Dummies, 3rd Edition
beginningprogrammingwithpythonfordummies.description_text: DUMMIES = PYTHON MASTERED   Beginning Programming with Python For Dummies 3rd Edition will get new programmers started with the basics of programming with Python. Download the software, create your first application, fix errors in your code, and integrate Python with a variety of data sets and other languages. There is no end to the incredible tasks that programming with Python can allow you to successfully complete. Join the ranks of millions of experienced programmers with help from the For Dummies team.   UPDATES: New chapter: Working with Google Colab New chapter: Working with line and cell magics Expanded information on functions and objects Updated coding examples and graphics

machinelearningwithsparkandpython_essent.human_name: Machine Learning with Spark and Python: Essential Techniques for Predictive Analytics, 2nd Edition
machinelearningwithsparkandpython_essent.description_text: Machine Learning with Spark and Python Essential Techniques for Predictive Analytics Second Edition simplifies ML for practical uses by focusing on two key algorithms. This new second edition improves with the addition of Spark - a ML framework from the Apache foundation. By implementing Spark, machine learning students can easily process much larger data sets and call the Spark algorithms using ordinary Python code.   Machine Learning with Spark and Python focuses on two algorithm families (linear methods and ensemble methods) that effectively predict outcomes.  This type of problem covers many use cases such as what ad to place on a web page, predicting prices in securities markets, or detecting credit card fraud.  The focus on two families gives enough room for full descriptions of the mechanisms at work in the algorithms.  Then the code examples serve to illustrate the workings of the machinery with specific hackable code.

teachyourselfvisuallypython.description_text: Get started in programming with Python! Teach Yourself VISCUALLY Python is your ultimate guide to getting you started in programming! Python has become one of the most popular programming languages in the world. If you are looking to take on programming, start here, right now, with this hands-on guide! This guide will get you started from the very beginning by installing the right version of Python, downloading and installing Thomy and getting it configured to work properly. Follow along through each steps by writing your first code in Python This book will also teach you how to; Get started with variables Work with files and folders How to make decisions in code Work with functions and text Handle errors and; Work with lists and classes. By the time you have gone through the exercises in this book, you will have the skills you need to manipulate text, work with images, and program your very on code projects.

pythonfordatasciencefordummies3rdedition.human_name: Python for Data Science For Dummies, 3rd Edition
pythonfordatasciencefordummies3rdedition.description_text: Learn how Python can further you and your career!  Python for Data Science For Dummies, 3rd Edition opens the door for those looking to get their hands dirty with data using one of the top programming languages. Whether youre just looking to gain a new skill or jump start a career, this beginners guide will take you step by step through how to get started, including performing data analysis, understanding datasets and example code, working with Google Colab, sampling data, and much more. Make your life easier by having Python do the work for you!  Inside Learn about possible careers with Python Consider the online coding difference Perform Multimedia and Graphic Integration Upload, Stream, and Sample Data Manage Data from Relational Databases Contextualize Problems and Data Play with Scikit-learn

jobreadypython.description_text: Job Ready Python delivers a comprehensive and foundational approach to Python that is immediately applicable to real-world environments. Based on the highly regarded and effective Software Guild Python course, this book teaches you the basic and advanced Python concepts you will need at any entry-level Python position. With the Pulling It Together sections, youll combine and integrate the concepts and lessons taught by the book, while also benefiting from: A thorough introduction to getting set up with Python Practical discussions of the basics of the Python language, including syntax, program flow, and code organization A walk through the fundamentals of Object-Oriented Programming including Classes, Objects, Interfaces, and Inheritance, and how to leverage OOP to create elegant code A focus on data processing and data analysis with Python

pythonessentialsfordummies.description_text: The core concepts of Python--in a concise and digestible format! Whether looking for a supplementary resource or seeking a quick brush-up on key concepts to help you work through advanced programming topics, Python Essentials For Dummies is the quick reference you need for the widely used general-purpose language, Python. This approachable reference covers all the key bases of Python and does so in a concise, small-trim book. Understand all you need to know about the foundations of Python, swiftly and crystal clear with Python Essentials For Dummies. Inside: Succinct explanations of critical concepts for Python

bite-sizepython_anintroductiontopythonpr.human_name: Bite-Size Python: An Introduction to Python Programming
bite-sizepython_anintroductiontopythonpr.description_text: This book provides and end-to-end foundational learning experience for the fastest-growing major programming language today, Python. Children are introduced to Python concepts in an easily digestible format through relatable examples, quick exercises and fun projects.The content in this book is designed to be simplistic enough for children but more important so that parents, guardians and instructors who are new to programming could follow along as their child or students explore new concepts in the book.Parents, guardians, and instructors who are looking for a complete beginners approach to helping children learn the Python programming language would purchase this book because the content does not assume prior knowledge of the language or any other programming language. In addition, the pages are not text-heavy, and an up-to-date GitHub repo is available for reference so that readers can try the projects out on their own computer. Furthermore, the artwork in the book shines light on inclusivity through the illustrated children characters of various backgrounds. A child who opens this book will see a reflection of themselves and therefore feel empowered and capable to learn Python.Children will have a better understanding of what Python is and how to create exciting projects that they can show off to their friends and family. This book will provide an overview of how to download and install Python as well as learning important key concepts along the way creating a bitter Python Picture.

unlockingpython_acomprehensiveguideforbe.human_name: Unlocking Python: A Comprehensive Guide for Beginners
unlockingpython_acomprehensiveguideforbe.description_text: From programming expert Ryan Mitchell comes Unlocking Python, a self-paced guide to Python for both new and seasoned programmers. The Python programming language is over 30 years old but remains one of the most popular and in-demand languages today. Clearly marked sections make it easy to learn about the industry, master the language and vocabulary of programming, and run commonly used programming tools. Readers can supplement their learning with short exercises and downloadable working code solutions. In the book, readers will discover: Installing and Running Python; Best Practices; Working with Files and Databases; and Data Processing and Science. Unlocking Python will certainly set the reader onto a successful programming journey.

pythonbook.description_text: The Python Book looks to meet the needs of those who work with data but do not have experience of using Python. The aim of this book is to be able to teach somebody with no programming experience how to program in Python and be able to apply their skills to data analysis tasks. With Python being such a general purpose language,  it is easy for any introductory text to concentrate on areas that are not useful to individuals who are really interested in data analysis. This book will be much more focused on what is important and why. This book looks to build the readers skills up at a slower pace with the focus on understanding why you do things the way you do. The aim at the end is not just for the reader to be able to do data analysis in Python but to understand why you would use a certain approach.Topics include:

pythonsoftwarefoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Python Software Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The mission of the Python Software Foundation is to promote, protect, and advance the Python programming language, and to support and facilitate the growth of a diverse and international community of Python programmers. The majority of the PSF's work is focused on empowering and supporting people within the Python community. The PSF has active grant programs that support sprints, conferences, meetups, user groups, and Python development efforts all over the world. In addition, the PSF underwrites and runs PyCon US, the primary Python community conference. Being part of the PSF means being part of the Python community. Recently we changed the PSF to an open membership organization, so that everyone who uses and supports Python can join. To learn more, visit https://www.python.org/psf/membership.

brazilianfunk.description_text:
Function Loops – Brazilian Funk is a compact toolkit for punchy, dance-floor-ready grooves. It delivers drum, instrumental and music loops plus catchy vocal hooks, built around the snap and swing of modern Brazilian/Baile funk.

Finish tracks fast with a focused set of one-shots (kicks, snares, percussion, bass, synth, FX, and vocal). WAV format, organized by type and ready for any DAW - 100% royalty-free.

futurepopdrums.description_text:
Future Pop Drums from Function Loops is a special collection, including only the drum samples and loops, collected from all the future pop packs, released this year.

We felt there's a huge lack of strictly drum packs for Future Pop genre, so they combined this massive pack of over 400 drum elements.

All the drums are grouped into kits to fit together. Everything is BPM labelled for ease of use. On top, you will also find a nice collection of percussion shots, which were produced from live recordings and Foley sounds.

Over 500MB of pure drum content, collected from Function Loops hit packs. These drums will rock in any Future Pop track and it's a great deal for producers looking for strictly drum content.

techhousepercussion.description_text: Tech House Percussion is a pack of all the percussive tools you must add into your next tracks, to give them the deserved dynamics. These percussion loops will make your tracks more live and groovy, guaranteed. A fat collection of almost 400MB of sounds, including Percussion Loops, Shots and Kicks. 275 files total, 200 x Loops, 50 x Shots, 25 x extra Kicks. All content at 24-bit WAV, 124BPM, easy to time stretch and change BPM without losing quality. Great for Tech House, but will be useful also for Deep House, Techno or Deep Tech.

futurehiphop.description_text:
Future Hip Hop' from Function Loops is a forward looking collection of Hip Hop sounds, loaded with unlimited inspiration.

Class-A Beats, 808s, Melodic Loops, Vocal Chops, One Shots, MIDI files and everything else a modern producer needs to get the next-gen productions going fast.

In detail you are getting 5 key and bpm labelled constructin kits. All content is 100% royalty-free, ready to be sold to labels, played on radios and so on. No extra cost - no hidden fees.

Grab Future Hip Hop and start taking care of your future, right now.

jackintechtools.description_text:

6 driving construction kits packed with Loops, Shots and MIDI files.

Collection full of funky beats, deep basslines, chopped vocals, chicago chords and fx loops. Pure inspiration for all house and tech producers!

All kits key and bpm labelled for ease of use, 24bit WAV quality. Over 370MB of content, 100% Royalty-Free.

reggaetonnewdrumkit.description_text: A new drumkit for Reggaeton is here and it's fire! Fresh ingredients for all producers, including Full Drum Loops, Hi-Hats, Kick Loops, Snare Loops, Percussion Loops, Top Loops and a whole collection of Kick, Hat, Percussion, Snap & Snare One Shots. On top of all, we included a Bonus folder with Vocal chops and Synths, which you can hear in the preview demo. Our sounds were found in some of the biggest Reggaeton hits , generating hundreds of millions of views. We deliver you the best stuff, guaranteed. All content 100% royalty free.

techhousemovies.description_text: Tech House Movies' delivers a new set of extremely popular sounds, inspired only by the most successful artists of the year. We found our sounds in some of the biggest releases in the Tech House scene, so you are in good hands :) Drum Loops, Bass Loops, Percussion Loops, Top Loops, Synth Loops, Vox Loops, Songstarters, One Shots - what else do you need? You are covered here. Let the crowd sweat it out with this new collection!

littlekidsrock.description_text:
Donations to support Musci Will are made to PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Music Will runs the largest nonprofit music program in the US public school system. Our teachers currently serve over 500,000 students in more than 600 cities and towns across the country.

We believe that music education is a right, not a privilege, and it should reflect the cultures of the students it serves.

That’s why, for two decades now, our programs have taught students such popular American genres as rock, pop, R&B, Latin, rap and country—alongside styles already taught in schools, such as classical and jazz.

Today, a national network of K-12 districts has adopted the Music Will program as their own.

More than 70 colleges and universities now teach our approach to their music education majors. Several state departments of education have partnered with Music Will to grow music education in the schools they serve.

Our mission of transforming lives by transforming music education has grown into a movement.

latinvocalhouse.description_text:

The pack includes 10 full construction kits with BPM and key labeling, plus a wide range of drum loops, guitar loops, synths, FX, percussion and basslines.

You'll also find both dry and wet vocal loops, vocal FX, and spoken/rap phrases that fit perfectly into your arrangements.

All elements are designed to be mixed and matched with ease, streamlining your workflow.

The vocals can fit into many other musical genres, too.

The long awaited toolkit for Psytrance and Progressive Psy producers has arrived. This time, it’s packed with insane amount of stuff, including construction kits, loops & samples, MIDI files and presets for Serum VSTi.

You’re getting 3 construction kits + full producer sample pack, loaded with Basslines, Ethnic Sounds, Cinematic Drums, Percussion, Kicks, Pitched and FX Loops, Music and Synth Loops, Vocals, Zaps and what not?!

Another great feature of this product is the Multisampled Basslines, you’re getting Bass Shots recorded in whole scale, ready for your favorite sampler. This will give you the opportunity to create world-class basslines in no time.

The pack was made using bunch of hardware gear, to deliver insane quality. You will find over 500 files, 1.9GB unzipped. Of course, everything is Key and BPM labelled, for ease of navigation.

The pack came up pretty big, with over 500MB of files! You will find all the drums big names use these days in all major tracks.

deepandsexyacapellaswithtonka2.description_text:
After the remarkable success of our first Tonka Acapellas pack, we have decided to create a decent sequel. Performed with even more passion, emotion and soul, this new Vocal pack contains a fresh collection of super useful phrases, both sung and spoken, plus extra laughters added as a bonus.

Download these Vocal Loops and use them in your new House or Garage track, enjoy Tonka's gorgeous performances and transform them into your next masterpiece.

Whole content recorded at 24-bit WAV quality, BPM & Key-Labelled, so you can use them with no effort. Just drop them in!

These Vocals will fit great in House/Tech-House/Deep-House/Garage and beyond.
Recorded by Ray Saul at Function Loops HQ.

ultimatepopdrums.description_text: Ultimate Pop Drums' delivers a versatile collection of freh drum sounds tailored for modern productions. You will find it useful for all Pop, Rnb, Trap and beyond. Designed for producers seeking punchy, radio-ready drum sounds, the one-shots provide flexibility for custom drum programming, while the loops offer instant inspiration. Inside you will find drum, percussion & foley one-shots, plus a bonus folder of loops such as drums, basses, synths, perc, guitar and vocal fx. It's time for fresh drum sounds, don't you think so?

odyssey_futuretechno.description_text:
Are you ready to embark on a sonic journey into the world of Future Techno? Look no further than "Odyssey - Future Techno", an exhilarating sample pack that brings together the best elements of Techno, EDM, and Trance to create a unique and forward-thinking music style.

Designed to inspire and ignite your creativity, Odyssey delivers a wealth of loops, one-shot samples, and MIDI files that will transport your productions to the next level.

Future Techno is a genre that pushes boundaries and embraces innovation. It blends the driving energy and rhythmic intricacies of Techno with the melodic sensibilities of Trance, all while incorporating the electronic elements and modern production techniques of EDM.

Within the Odyssey - Future Techno sample pack, you'll find a treasure trove of meticulously crafted sounds that capture the essence of this genre. The diverse collection of loops spans exciting fx, pulsating basslines, mesmerizing synths, intricate drum patterns, evolving arpeggios and SciFi vocals.

But that's not all. Odyssey also includes a set of drum one-shot samples that give you the freedom to create your own unique drum patterns, as well as a bunch of MIDI files to let you further expand your creativity.

Odyssey - Future Techno is not just a sample pack; it's an invitation to dive headfirst into a new frontier of electronic music. Experience the sonic revolution of Future Techno - your musical odyssey starts here.

Get your ultimate Bass assistant and start working on some pro-sounding grooves right now!

Oh, it also comes with MIDI files from the music loops and even some Serum presets :)

We used a lot of hardware too, all the sounds were processed with UAD.

So, there's not much left to say, except that the pack is a serious helper in the studio. Check the demo - the quality is crazy!

Grab this collection now and improve your production significantly. Be inspired with "Future Progressive!"Future Progressive" from SHARP (Function Loops Label Group) is a collection of advanced sounds, crafted for Progressive House producers.

'No Sleep - UK Garage' collection gives the flexibility to construct your own grooves or enhance existing ones with ease. From catchy melodies to infectious rhythms, the possibilities are endless.

majorreggaeton.description_text:
Brand new collection of hit Reggaeton sounds, coming from Function Loops. Five construction kits, recorded at highest standard. Each kit comes with amazing Vocal Acapellas in English and Spanish.

Over 1GB of content, including Drums, Percussion, Basslines, Melodies, Vocals, FX and all the rest you can hear in the demo. Each Kit comes with Loops, One-Shots, Full Stems and MIDI files, for maximum flexibility:

Loops: 4 to 8 bar audio files, coming as 24-Bit WAV. Simply drag and drop them into your DAW and manipulate to fit your project.

One-Shots: Single shots, short samples. Good to use in your favourite sampler.

Full Stems: These are long, arranged files. Simply import them into any DAW and you will get an already arranged piece, ready for further development.

MIDI: Melodic parts are also coming as MIDI files, giving you maximum flexibility to tweak, recreate and make your own sounds, using VSTis or samplers.

All content is 100% royalty-free.

No matter, what genre you are into, grab this collection and inject these vocals into your next tracks - you will see your fans go nuts about it.

In terms of technical details, "Tech X Afro" is as follows: 488MB in size (unzipped), 328 loops & one-shots, 24-bit WAV files. Of course, all samples are 100% royalty-free, as usual.

In addition to the kits, you will also find an extra Sample Pack inside, packed with FX Loops, Percussion Loops, Drum Shots, Bass Loops & Shots, MIDI files & Sylenth Presets. Total of 320+ files, a fat producer pack for modern Tech House productions.

All Kits come with Loops, MIDI files and One Shots. All sounds you hear in the demo are included. 100% royalty-free, 24-bit quality. The additional Sample Pack (190 x files) will be useful for the extra touch.
