Not even death would free them from this doom, for Chaos granted them the Gift of Immortality -- so that even if one managed to defeat the other, they would be reborn, and regain their powers to continue their eternal war.

Difficulty level
The world of Aeterna Noctis features a challenging difficulty system that scales progressively as you the player go through the game and get more experienced with the controls and unlock new skills. It keeps you on the edge of your seat, always offering a challenge with each encounter, but also resulting in a great sense of pride after completing each challenge. If you are a lover of Metroidvania games, in Aeterna Noctis there is a perfect game mode for you, the Aeterna Mode. However, if extreme challenges and platforming are what you want, you are a Noctis Mode player. But do you know what the differences are between these game modes? We explain it to you.

- Aeterna Mode (A pure Metroidvania experience)
In essence, the game has been completely redesigned to offer you as a player a 100% Metroidvania experience where action and exploration are the protagonists. If it's one of your favorite genres, don't miss the opportunity to get lost in a huge open world with 16 unique areas and hundreds of enemies with unique mechanics. The challenge lies in recovering your power and facing fearsome final bosses that will demand the most of you.

- Noctis Mode (Platforms and extreme challenges)
We could say that for the first time two genres such as Metroidvania and platform games have been mixed. Playing on this mode, you will not only have to explore and recover your powers, but you will also face constant puzzles, platform sections and challenges only recommended for the most demanding players. If you think this is not for you, we do not recommend playing on Noctis Mode since frustration can ruin the experience. This mode includes all the achievements, so it is also ideal for completionist players or for those who, after beating Aeterna mode, want to enjoy the title again with more difficulty.

In Aeterna Mode, the spikes have been removed from the platforms to make it easier to fight the enemy. This way you can slide and lean on the platforms without worrying about environmental hazards.

In Aeterna Mode, the chainsaw puzzle is replaced by an enemy encounter. This way the gaming experience is more focused on exploration and action, moving away from more challenging puzzles.

In Aeterna Mode, environmental hazards have been removed so navigation through the level is less demanding and doesn't require pinpoint accuracy.

In Aeterna Mode, you have more hazard-free space to jump, dodge, and attack enemies. In Noctis Mode, you are required to be more precise with the controls to avoid all environmental hazards, such as spikes.

Playing in Noctis Mode you have to pay attention to breakable platforms and time your jumps correctly, while in Aeterna Mode you can move more freely without the need for precise jumps and dashes.

What if I started in Noctis mode and the difficulty is too much for me? Or... What if I started in Aeterna mode but want a more challenging experience?
The player can switch between one mode or the other at any time without losing progress and reloading the game at the last save point, allowing the Aeterna Noctis experience to be shaped at your will.

Fluid gameplay mechanics
In a game with such a difficulty curve that scales with progression, Aeterna Noctis features extremely responsive controls, allowing for precise movement and combat.

High mobility
Intuitive world design allowing the players to exploit the precise movement controls of the character, allowing you to overcome each challenge in a multitude of ways. As you become more skilled in the game, it allows you to get even faster completion times.

Deep, beautiful plot
Featuring an immersive and emotional story with incredible moments, filled with unexpected twists that will immerse the players into the rich world of Aeterna Noctis.

Traditional 2D Art
Worldbuilding in Aeterna Noctis is completed by handcrafting each asset, animation and environmental detail in the game using traditional illustration methods by the art team, giving rise to a vibrant and beautifully assembled world.

Freedom of choice
Aeterna Noctis features a defined path for the storyline, but allows the player to take whatever path and pacing to navigate the expansive non-linear map featuring 16 different zones, interconnected in a classic metroidvania style.

More than 40 music tracks
Aeterna Noctis features over 40 unique tracks each with its own theme. Once the game is made available, the OST will be released with special covers of the main songs as a piano collection.

care_org.description_text:
Donations to support Care.org are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.
 
Founded in 1945 with the creation of the CARE Package®, CARE is a leading humanitarian organization fighting global poverty. CARE places special focus on working alongside women and girls. Equipped with the proper resources women and girls have the power to lift whole families and entire communities out of poverty. In 2022, CARE worked in over 110 countries, reaching more than 170 million people through 1,600 projects.

gestalt_steamcinder.description_text:
Join Aletheia and a vibrant cast of characters as they race to discover the secrets of the Steam City of Canaan. Clobber armies of Clockwork golems and hunt horrors that slither through depths once forgotten. Thwart the twisted schemes of Canaan’s corrupt overseers, the nefarious Comitium. Fight for mankind’s survival and reveal the dark and dangerous truths riveted into the very foundations of the Steam City.

Step into the shoes of Aletheia and tread the path of the Soldner, an elite mercenary of Irkalla who lives one job at a time. Take up the sword and gun, combining a slew of melee combos and deadly gunplay in staggering feats of skill that will leave your enemies reeling.

Chase down a frenzied mutant charging through the grimy stalls of the Irkallan Black Market, leap across the molten pools blazing in the eternal furnace of Fornax, and fight off hordes of blood-drunk Raiders that prowl the fathomless depths of the Scrap Sea in search of their malignant god.

Canaan is vast, and inside its swirling steam lie innumerable mysteries waiting to be unraveled. After a routine job goes awry, Aletheia sets out on an epic journey to uncover ancient enigmas threatening the very foundations of the Steam City. Challenge powerful new rivals and catch up with old friends as you carve your path through Canaan. Take on side jobs to earn a bit of extra scrap and delve into a history lost to the vagaries of time.

Or maybe you’d just like to wash down your worries at Vincent’s Pub and listen for a rumor or two…

Dash, dodge, and double-jump to keep out of harm’s way and stay in one piece. Wield a furious and fearsome array of abilities and grow stronger with each foe you defeat. Spend experience points to unlock new skills and trade scrap for accessories to customize your build and go toe-to-toe with some of the most formidable creatures to ever lumber beneath the copper sky.

Hear that? The clang of a hammer stinging blood-red steel… The sinister murmur of heresies rushing through ancient pipes… Riddles echoing through vaulted halls of marble and madness. Sounds like fate has a job in store for you, Soldner—it’s time to earn your scrap.

“Thine trembling works of Reason naught but ingots gleaming darkly by the light of a cindered heart—for what art thine flesh before the mother’s touch of flame?”

- Dreams of the Steam Saint Anais, XXXIV, iii

thedevilwithin_satgat.description_text:
THE NIGHTMARE BEGINS

An enormous spiked tower of mysterious origins suddenly appears in the land of Joseon.

The Pure White Oil that oozed from the Radiant Spire instantly revitalized the drying land of Joseon, providing the catalyst for dazzling technological advancements including Dimensional Gates. However, the Royal Court of Joseon yearned for more and continued their reckless research to further harness the power of the Radiant Spire. In the end, they made a dreadful mistake, summoning hellish demons to ravage this land...

TRUST ONLY YOUR SWORDSMANSHIP

In a world decimated by destruction, the majority of its inhabitants have long since been corrupted into demons and roam aimlessly.

With just a sword in hand, assume the role of Kim Rip and cut down the numerous demons that threaten both you and the world at large. Employ the power of the demon that resides within you to break past your limits and utterly shatter your foes.

One thing is for certain: your blade is needed to navigate this desolate world.

FIGHT FIERCE BATTLES

The fate of the world rests on your shoulders as you face off against hordes of malevolent demons. Make full use of your combat prowess, train your body, and execute strategies to eliminating the mighty demons that stand in your way.

Master an array of advanced offensive, defensive, and mobility skills to vanquish the powerful adversaries and rescue a shattered world.

EMBRACE THE POWER OF DEMONS

As you advance through this world, a somber revelation dawns upon you: to defeat the demons, you must become a demon yourself.

With the special abilities granted to you by the demon, eliminate powerful demons lurking in each region to grow stronger and make their power your own. Venture deeper into uncharted territories to uncover clues that will aid you in mastering the demonic power that grows within you.

DISCOVER THE SECRETS OF A DARK WORLD

Due to the influence of the spike, mysterious artifacts have regained their lost powers and have appeared in various regions, waiting for a new owner to utilize them. Whether you decide to seek them out or continue on your way is a decision only you can make.

However, if you become their master, they can provide powers that will allow you to break your limits and make your journey easier. Exercise caution in your search for these potent relics... the search can have some deadly risks.

VAST INTERCONNECTED WORLD

Embark on an epic journey through a meticulously interwoven world, comprising a varied landscape that includes desolate cities, rugged peaks, dense forests, military complexes, and other locales. Certain routes may be obstructed until you have honed your skills and gained the necessary strength. Slay formidable adversaries to survive in this perilous world. Thoroughly scour each location to uncover enhancements and skills that will empower you for the daunting trials that await.

care_org.description_text:
Donations to support Care.org are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.
 
Founded in 1945 with the creation of the CARE Package®, CARE is a leading humanitarian organization fighting global poverty. CARE places special focus on working alongside women and girls. Equipped with the proper resources women and girls have the power to lift whole families and entire communities out of poverty. In 2022, CARE worked in over 110 countries, reaching more than 170 million people through 1,600 projects.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: Metroidvania Mayhem Bundle
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Rabi-Rabi, Lost Ruins, Aeterna Noctis, Ultros Deluxe Edition, Gestalt: Steam & Cinder, F.I.S.T.: Forged In Shadow Torch, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
There’s nothing better than a really great Metroidvania game, and this bundle full of side-scrolling fantasy and sci-fi action has some of the best! Help an amnesiac girl battle monsters in a strange land in Lost Ruins! Play as a rabbit with a giant robot fist and liberate your city from its robotic oppressors in F.I.S.T.: Forged in Shadow Torch! Join a ruthless bounty hunter to explore the steampunk world and twist-filled story of Gestalt: Steam & Cinder! Whether you’re a fan of that classic pixelated style or you’re just really in the mood for a juicy adventure game, this bundle has everything you need for the price of your choice—and every purchase supports CARE!

Keys expire. Please redeem Ultros Deluxe Edition before October 1st, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before April 1st, 2027.
from_bundle.author: Publishers

basic_data.human_name: Frictional Games: Amnesia, SOMA, Penumbra
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Three great franchises, one amazing publisher—pay what you want for the very best from Frictional Games. Brave the critically acclaimed Amnesia series—first-person horror adventures that challenge your wits and courage with inventive puzzles and a haunting atmosphere. Set in the depths of the Atlantic Ocean, SOMA is a sci-fi horror experience that will make you question your very existence. Flex your mental might in the puzzle-driven psychological horror adventure Penumbra Collectors Pack. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support the Against Malaria Foundation!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 1st, 2027
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: The hottest horror titles curated for you
basic_data.description:
The hottest horror titles curated for you. Three great franchises, one amazing publisher—pay what you want for the very best from Frictional Games. Brave the critically acclaimed Amnesia series—first-person horror adventures that challenge your wits and courage with inventive puzzles and a haunting atmosphere. Set in the depths of the Atlantic Ocean, SOMA is a sci-fi horror experience that will make you question your very existence. Flex your mental might in the puzzle-driven psychological horror adventure Penumbra Collectors Pack. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support the Against Malaria Foundation!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 1st, 2027

Pay $10 or more. Normally, the total cost for the games in this bundle is as much as $134. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $10 purchase. Pay $10 or more to access Steam keys.

Redeem on Steam. All of the games in this bundle are available on Steam for Windows — and some for Mac and Linux too. Please review the system requirements here prior to purchasing.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the developer and to support Against Malaria Foundation. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

amnesia_thebunker.callout: A semi-open world extraction horror game set in a WWI bunker. You are hunted by a single, persistent monster that reacts to sound. Unlike previous games, you have a revolver and grenades—though ammo is extremely scarce—and you must manage a noisy dynamo flashlight while keeping the bunker’s main generator fueled to stay alive.
amnesia_thebunker.description_text:
Amnesia: The Bunker is a first-person horror game from the makers of SOMA and Amnesia.

Left all alone in a desolate WW1 bunker with only one bullet remaining in the barrel, it’s up to you to face the oppressing terrors in the dark. Keep the lights on at all costs, persevere, and make your way out alive. A truly intense horror experience.

RISING TENSION
Immerse yourself in the multiple ways of tackling survival. In the shoes of the French soldier Henri Clément, you are armed with a revolver gun, a noisy dynamo flashlight, and other scarce supplies to scavenge and craft along the way. With randomization and unpredictable behavior, no play-through is the same.

Hunted by an ever-present threat reacting to your every move and sound, you must adapt your play-style to face hell. Every decision will change the outcome of how the game responds. Actions bear consequences.

ESCAPING THE NIGHTMARE
Solve things your own way in a semi-open world. You must explore and experiment to make your way out. Figure out what’s going on down here - what has happened to the other soldiers? Where have all the officers gone? What diabolical nightmare lurks underneath this hellscape? Unravel the mysteries of the Bunker and get to know the nooks and crannies of this cruel sandbox to up your odds of survival.

FEATURES
  • Dynamic and ever-present monster that reacts to player actions.
  • Constant tension - Time is not on your side.
  • Tactile and physics based interactions with the world.
  • Scavenge for resources and craft tools to aid your survival.
  • Multiple solutions to problem solving in a non-linear open world.

soma.callout: SOMA is set in a decaying underwater research facility called PATHOS-II, and uses the same "hide-and-seek" horror mechanics as Amnesia,
soma.description_text:
SOMA is a sci-fi horror game from Frictional Games, the creators of Amnesia: The Dark Descent. It is an unsettling story about identity, consciousness, and what it means to be human.

The radio is dead, food is running out, and the machines have started to think they are people. Underwater facility PATHOS-II has suffered an intolerable isolation and we’re going to have to make some tough decisions. What can be done? What makes sense? What is left to fight for?

Enter the world of SOMA and face horrors buried deep beneath the ocean waves. Delve through locked terminals and secret documents to uncover the truth behind the chaos. Seek out the last remaining inhabitants and take part in the events that will ultimately shape the fate of the station. But be careful, danger lurks in every corner: corrupted humans, twisted creatures, insane robots, and even an inscrutable omnipresent A.I.
You will need to figure out how to deal with each one of them. Just remember there’s no fighting back, either you outsmart your enemies or you get ready to run.

againstmalariafoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Against Malaria Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The Against Malaria Foundation helps protect people from malaria. They fund anti-malaria nets, specifically long-lasting insecticidal nets (LLINs), and work with distribution partners to ensure they are used.

amnesia_rebirth.callout: Set in 1937, you follow Tasi Trianon after a plane crash in the Algerian desert. This entry leans into cosmic horror and high-stakes personal drama.
amnesia_rebirth.description_text:
You can’t let out a breath. The creature is only inches away. Its sole purpose - to feed off your terror. And so you crouch in the dark, trying to stop the fear rising, trying to silence what lies within you.

“I know you. I know what you're capable of.”

In Amnesia: Rebirth, you are Tasi Trianon, waking up deep in the desert of Algeria. Days have passed. Where have you been? What did you do? Where are the others? Retrace your journey, pull together the fragments of your shattered past; it is your only chance to survive the pitiless horror that threatens to devour you.

“Do not allow yourself anger, do not allow yourself to fear.”

Time is against you. Step into Tasi’s shoes and guide her through her personal terror and pain. While you struggle to make your way through a desolate landscape, you must also struggle with your own hopes, fears, and bitter regrets. And still you must continue, step by step, knowing that if you fail you will lose everything.

  • First-person narrative horror experience
  • Explore environments and uncover their histories.
  • Overcome puzzles that stand in your way.
  • Carefully manage your limited resources, both physical and mental.
  • Encounter horrific creatures and use your wits and understanding of the world to escape them.

Also available in Adventure Mode for those who want the story and adventure without the horror.

penumbra_collection.callout: This is the precursor to Amnesia and includes the full trilogy: Overture, Black Plague, and Requiem.
penumbra_collection.description_text:
Penumbra Collection includes:
  • Penumbra: Black Plague
  • Penumbra: Overture
  • Penumbra: Requiem
Like all good nightmares, Philip's begins with something all too real - his mother's death. The days following the funeral are characterized by nothing, save for an incessant feeling of abandonment. Until, that is, he receives a letter from a dead man.

Penumbra is a first person horror adventure focussing on story, immersion and puzzle solving. Violence and combat is hardly an option - the player has to use wits to guide Philip through his final test, and this makes the series unique in offering a truly dangerous and terrifying experience.

Use of this product requires agreement to the following third party end user license agreement: 
https://frictionalgames.com/privacy-policy/eula-penumbra-requiem/
https://frictionalgames.com/privacy-policy/eula-penumbra-black-plague/
https://frictionalgames.com/privacy-policy/eula-penumbra-overture/

amnesia_thedarkdescent.callout: The game that redefined modern horror. You play as Daniel, trapped in the gothic Brennenburg Castle with no memory of how you arrived. It famously features no combat; your only options are to run, hide, or solve physics-based puzzles.
amnesia_thedarkdescent.description_text:
The last remaining memories fade away into darkness. Your mind is a mess and only a feeling of being hunted remains. You must escape.

Amnesia: The Dark Descent puts you in the shoes of Daniel as he wakes up in a desolate castle, barely remembering anything about his past. Exploring the eerie pathways, you must also take part of Daniel's troubled memories. The horror does not only come from the outside, but from the inside as well. A disturbing odyssey into the dark corners of the human mind awaits.

amnesia_amachineforpigs.callout: An indirect sequel to Amnesia set in 1899 London. It follows wealthy industrialist Oswald Mandus as he descends into a hellish, automated slaughterhouse beneath his home.
amnesia_amachineforpigs.description_text: From the creators of Amnesia: The Dark Descent and Dear Esther comes a new first-person horror game that drags you to the depths of greed, power, and madness. Wealthy industrialist Oswald Mandus wakes up in his bed, wracked with fever and haunted by dreams of a dark and hellish engine. Tortured by visions of a disastrous expedition to Mexico, broken on the failing dreams of an industrial utopia, wracked with guilt and tropical disease, he wakes into a nightmare. The house is silent, the ground beneath him shaking at the will of an infernal machine — all he knows is that his children are in grave peril, and it's up to him to save them.

againstmalariafoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Against Malaria Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The Against Malaria Foundation helps protect people from malaria. They fund anti-malaria nets, specifically long-lasting insecticidal nets (LLINs), and work with distribution partners to ensure they are used.

basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Crochet divas and granny square baddies, don’t miss out on this fantastic bundle full of patterns and inspo for the crochet projects of your wildest dreams! We’ve teamed up with Leisure Arts to bring you crafting idea ebooks that will get your hooks moving! Learn how to make miniature crochet food in the tradition of amigurumi with Ice Box Crochet! Discover that granny squares literally have no limit with 99 Granny Squares to Crochet! Get started on your crochet journey with Learn How to Crochet Now! Craft some award-winning creations with Contest Favorites Mile-A-Minute Afghans! There’s so much more to add to your crochet skill set in this 26-ebook bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support One Tree Planted with your purchase!
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: Get Ice Box Crochet, Easy Rugs to Crochet, Learn to Crochet Now! and more!
basic_data.description:
Not your granny’s granny squares. Crochet divas and granny square baddies, don’t miss out on this fantastic bundle full of patterns and inspo for the crochet projects of your wildest dreams! We’ve teamed up with Leisure Arts to bring you crafting idea ebooks that will get your hooks moving! Learn how to make miniature crochet food in the tradition of amigurumi with Ice Box Crochet! Discover that granny squares literally have no limit with 99 Granny Squares to Crochet! Get started on your crochet journey with Learn How to Crochet Now! Craft some award-winning creations with Contest Favorites Mile-A-Minute Afghans! There’s so much more to add to your crochet skill set in this 26-ebook bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support One Tree Planted with your purchase!

Pay $3 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $254. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $3 purchase.

Read them anywhere. The ebooks in this bundle are available in PDF and ePub formats, so they work on your computer, e-readers, iPads, cell phones, and a wide array of mobile devices! Instructions and a list of recommended reading programs can be found here.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publisher and to support One Tree Planted. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

bestofterrykimbroughbabyafghans.human_name: Best of Terry Kimbrough Baby Afghans
bestofterrykimbroughbabyafghans.description_text: Wrap your baby in handcrafted softness with these baby afghan designs. Only the best for Baby. Cuddle your little angel in any of these 24 soft, cuddly wraps. Several coverlets feature heirloom designs. All designs require size 2 sport weight yarn and a hook in US size F-5, G-6 or H-8; 3 3/4, 4, 5 millimeters. Includes basic stitch information and step-by-step instructions. Finished afghan sizes measures between approximately 29"x 40" and 37"x 46". Beginner to advanced skill level.

learntocrochetnow.description_text: Then discover how easy it is to go on to create 3 more beginner-friendly projects. With step-by-step explanations covering how to hold your hook, identifying stitches, how to read patterns, and finishing techniques. Includes both right and left handed instructions for chain, single, double, half double and treble crochet. Uses size 4 worsted weight yarn and hook sizes H, I and K.

easytocrochetpatternstitches.description_text: Stitches include: single, double, half-double, treble, popcorn, cluster, puff, horizontal relief, bushy and many more. Row by row stitching instructions, basic crochet guides, full-color swatch photos and project instructions will help you master each stitch. Afghan design calls for size 4 worsted weight yarn and a US size H-8, 5mm, crochet hook. Mix and match block designs to create a unique design. Finished afghan measures approximately 59"x 75". Beginner skill level.

onetreeplanted.description_text:
Donations to support One Tree Planted are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.
 
We are a non-profit focused on global reforestation. Every dollar donated plants one tree.

funnyamigurimi.description_text:
Break into crochet with amigurumi, the Japanese craft of crocheting small stuffed toys! Beginners and crochet enthusiasts alike will delight in choosing from 16 quirky creatures to create, including a dapper tiger, a masked fox, an adorable hedgehog, and more. Quick and satisfying to make, these 4.5˝-tall creatures can be made in a few hours or over the course of a day or weekend. They are also conveniently portable for creating on the go.

  • Crochet 16 quirky characters and their accessories
  • Portable, collectable, and giftable 4.5˝-tall creatures made by you!
  • Beginners delight in easy-to-follow crochet instructions

contestfavoritemile-a-minuteafghans.description_text: The top 10 designs are presented as full-size afghans while the remaining designs are given as single strips with individual joining instructions. The detailed, easy-to-follow instructions will take the mystery out of creating these fabulous, winning projects.

yournameandmoreinfiletcrochet.human_name: Your Name & More in Filet Crochet
yournameandmoreinfiletcrochet.description_text: Projects include: family name initial design, welcome table runner, God bless our home wall hanging and two versions of a full family name motif. Designs can be made using US size 10 bedspread weight cotton yarn and a size 6, 1.8mm, crochet hook. Includes instructions, motif charts and alphabets charts for customization. Finished designs measure between approximately 7" and 48"x 19".

crochetforchristmas.description_text: The designs can be made and displayed in your home or given as gifts. Projects include a pillow, stocking, placemat, ornaments, and more. Each can be made using size 4 worsted weight yarn. Detailed instructions are included.

chasethechill-crochetedhatsscarvesandmit.human_name: Chase the Chill-Crocheted Hats, Scarves, and Mittens for the Family; 16 Designs
chasethechill-crochetedhatsscarvesandmit.description_text: Make a fashion statement while keeping ears and fingers warm with this collection of quick and easy crochet projects. This book features a variety of hats, scarves, mittens, earmuffs, and more for children and adults. All projects use worsted weight yarn. Includes finishing techniques like: pom poms, color changes, fringe, beads, cross stitch embellishments, and crocheted flowers.

cozycrochetedslippers.description_text: 5" to 10". Everyone will love these comfy slippers. In colorful red, fuchsia, or royal blue, this easy-to-make footwear will be used the minute it's completed. Comes with simple instructions, handy stitching tips, and color photography of the finished projects. Each project uses worsted weight yarn, some use two strands held together throughout.

111easyedgings.description_text: The easiest edgings you'll ever crochet, the 111 graceful designs in this collection let you skip all the arithmetic and planning of the traditional method. These beautiful edgings are worked from top to bottom. No matter what you use these to embellish, they will add a gorgeous finishing touch. Crochet designs include: shells, waves, scallops, and so much more. Same designs are crocheted with size 10 bedspread weight cotton thread and a steel US size 7 crochet hook. Includes row-by-row instructions for each design and a general guide to crochet.

afghansbythealphabet.description_text: Take a jazzy journey, relax in the lap of luxury, or gift your favorite little one the clown carnival and baby's best blankie. Features styles, textures, and motifs to appeal to anyone on your gift list while providing a large assortment of techniques and patterns.

40favoriterippleafghans.description_text: Designs include: snowman, vineyard grapes, and more. 126 pages, soft cover.

crochetedscrapstobeautyafghans.description_text: Instead, give one of these stunning afghans a try. These three patterns are beautiful, versatile, and specifically designed to use up leftover yarn. Our easy-to-follow instructions and diagrams make this a great resource, even for beginners. Grab your crochet hooks and turn that scrap pile into something amazing. 12 pages, in a softcover.

babyafghanstoknitandcrochet.human_name: Baby Afghans to Knit and Crochet
babyafghanstoknitandcrochet.description_text: In this book you will find four crochet designs including buttercup squares, granny squares, knitted ripples, and crochet ripples. All designs call for worsted weight yarn, and crochet hooks H and I. First design measures approximately 34"x 45", second design measures approximately 41"x 51", third design measures approximately 32"x 41", and the fourth design measures approximately 30"x 40". 4 pages, in a softcover.

21daystolearntocrochet.description_text:
In 21 days, you’ll learn everything there is to know about crochet! By alternating between learning and creating, this hands-on method helps you quickly master the essential techniques and stitches. Start your crochet journey with delightful projects like granny squares, tawashi, baskets, shawls, and amigurumi. With detailed step-by-step tutorials and illustrated photos, you’ll make swift progress and gain the confidence to tackle any crochet project you dream up!

  • Go from beginner to confident crocheter with step-by-step crochet instructions, where each day brings a fresh new lesson
  • Build muscle memory by practicing daily how to do basic stitches, color switches, and how to increase and decrease stitches with ease
  • Enjoy a structured and fun learning experience following a proven formula: two days of learning, one day of goal-oriented practice, and one day for finishing touches

99grannysquarestocrochet.description_text: Crochet these squares using worsted weight yarn, fine baby yarn, or chunky yarn.

snowflakelayettetocrochet.description_text: Includes detailed instructions and diagrams for reproducing snowflake stitches and cross stitches in crochet. Use size 2 fine weight yarn and US size E crochet hook. Finished carriage blanket measures approximately 29 1/2"x 34". 8 pages, in a softcover.

afghanparade.description_text: With two color recommendations per design, you can fully personalize your afghan to fit your home decor theme. Designs include: small shell, v-stitch shell, lacy chevron, and stained glass. Each project can be made using size 4 worsted weight yarn and US size H-8, 5 millimeter, or J-10, 6 millimeter, crochet hooks. Includes step-by-step instructions for each design, general instructions and illustrated stitch diagrams. Finished afghans measure between approximately 48"x 70" and 50"x 73". Easy level.

ourbestbabyafghans.description_text: Select from this wide range of styles and wrap up your darling baby with a treasured heirloom afghan. Designs include: granny's love, peppermint wrapper, ruffles all around, cuddle time blossoms, rainbow ripples, baby-soft, ripples, bathed in bubbles, cheery stripes and more. Projects call for size 1 super fine, 2 fine, 3 light and 4 worsted weight yarns and a wide range of standard crochet hook sizes. Includes step-by-step instructions fore each design and a general guide to crochet with illustrated stitch diagrams. Finished baby afghans measure between approximately 31"x 37" and 47"x 53". Beginner skill level.

easyrugstocrochet.description_text: Finished sizes range from approximately 23"x 36" to 26"x 38" for the rectangle patterns. Round rug measures approximately 41" in diameter when worked to gauge.

whitechristmasinthreadcrochet.description_text: Designs include: garlands, tree toppers, skirts, and ornaments. There's something in here to fit your holiday decor. Using white cotton thread size 10 and size 7, 1.65mm hook. Intermediate skill level

so-brightrompersets.description_text: Designs include 2 boy sets and 2 girl sets with instructions for rompers, sweaters, hats, booties, and blankets. Step-by-step instruction take you through each set, while full-color photos give you a dose of cuteness and inspiration.

iceboxcrochet.description_text: Great for using scrap yarn, these faux foods make fun toys as well as cute home decorations and refrigerator magnets. Over 45 creations include: chicken, pickles, soda can, donut, Popsicle, cake, flan, burger, pizza, eggs, bread, watermelon, bananas and much more. Includes step-by-step instruction for each project plus a guide to yarn sizing and common amigurumi techniques. The finished sizes of your projects will vary depending on the yarn used, but measure between approximately 1"x 2" and 3 1/4"x 2 3/4" when worked up with size 2 fine weight yarn and a US size B, 2.25 mm, crochet hook. Finished Ice Box project will stand approximately 13" tall in fine weight yarn, 16.5" in lightweight yarn, or 20" in medium weight yarn. Easy skill level.

48-hourafghans.description_text: Perfect choices when your time is limited, they are fun to crochet and can be made using interesting and trendy yarns. Projects include stadium blankets, afghans and throws with step-by-step instructions. Book explains common crochet terms with popcorn, front post treble, back post treble, puff, V, cluster and 3 double crochet cluster special stitches. Patterns call for US size 4 worsted, 5 chunky or 6 bulky weight yarns. Each project uses one hook ranging between US size H-8 and N-13; 5 to 9 millimeter hooks. Finished sizes range between approximately 41"x 52" and 65"x 67".

bigbookofquickknitafghans.human_name: Big Book of Quick Knit Afghans
bigbookofquickknitafghans.description_text: Relatively quick and easy, each solid-color knitted blanket offers comforting warmth while adding a welcome pop of color to the gray winter days. These afghans are worked holding two strands of size 4 worsted weight yarn and 29" circular knitting needles in US sizes 15 and 17. Designs feature beautiful ripples, ridges, diamonds, cables, twists, and popcorns. Designs include courtly, peaceful, alluring, fragrant, traditional, twilight and more. Step-by-step stitch guides, instructions and diagrams also included. Finished afghan sizes vary between approximately 45"x 58" and 53"x 69". Intermediate skill level.

makeoneforbaby.description_text: With 8 charming designs by Carole Rutter Tippett, there’s something here for everyone. Each crochet pattern includes a list of needed materials, general instructions, and detailed illustrations to guide you through the steps. You’ll also find helpful tips on gauge, edging, assembly, and keys with crochet terminology and abbreviations. Create an adorable blanket that baby will cherish for years to come!

We are a non-profit focused on global reforestation. Every dollar donated plants one tree.

customar-15stylerifle.description_text:
More InfoSupports UE 5.4 – 5.6

Elevate your project with this high-quality, game-ready 3D model of a custom AR-15 assault rifle. Meticulously crafted with a focus on detail and realism, this asset is perfect for first-person shooters, survival games, military simulations, or as a high-detail prop for cinematic renders.

Features:

  • High-quality 4K PBR Textures for stunning, realistic detail.
  • Includes a functional, easy-to-use custom rig for essential animations.
  • Demo is set up with Epic's Animation Starter Pack.
  • Vertex Count: 55,985.
  • LODs are included.

zombie_police.description_text:
More InfoSupports UE 5.1 – 5.6

This Zombie Police Officer character is an ideal enemy for any apocalyptic world, designed for high-end visuals and smooth performance. Include this undead enforcer in your project to instantly raise the stakes.

Features:

  • Game-ready with clean topology and optimized for real-time performance.
  • Fully rigged to the UE4 Epic Skeleton (IK bones included) and compatible with standard humanoid animations.
  • High-quality 4K PBR textures for realistic uniform and skin details.
  • Vertex count: 31,006.
  • LODs are included.
  • Perfect for open-world survival games, FPS, and zombie-themed cinematics.
  • No animations are included.

restaurantanddivebar_vol2_bar.human_name: Restaurant and Dive Bar VOL.2 - Bar
restaurantanddivebar_vol2_bar.description_text:
More InfoSupports UE 4.17 - 4.27 and 5.0 - 5.6

This project includes everything pictured with all assets, maps, materials, Blueprints, and effects created in the Unreal Engine. Each asset was created for realistic AAA quality visuals, style, and budget.

Features:

  • 70+ Meshes
  • High quality texture sets - most 2048 pixels +
  • Master material set up that control the majority of all props and models

The Dystopian City Environment is a comprehensive asset pack for creating your own cyberpunk universe. It includes ready-to-use building blueprints, easily modifiable meshes with a wide range of tileable materials, a highway spline system, and numerous cyberpunk-styled street props. The pack also comes with a pre-built, static-lit city map on an island, featuring over 10 city blocks, which you can use as a starting point or for inspiration.

luggagesuitcasesandhandbagsvol2.description_text:
More InfoSupports UE 5.1 – 5.6

Cover your world with high-quality, game-ready luggage, suitcase, and handbag assets. This pack includes an optimized, interactable blueprint that allows you to quickly spawn and randomize luggage in your world, complete with sounds, particles, and physics configured for looting and collision.

Each mesh has a skeletal mesh variation rigged for realistic soft-body physics, allowing you to simulate ragdoll effects when the objects are shot or hit.

Features:

  • 11 set-dressing presets.
  • 5 unique rigged bag meshes with custom physics assets for soft-body simulation.
  • An easy-to-use, level-designer-friendly ""BP_Interactable"" for opening/closing, procedural spawning, and locking/randomizing meshes.
  • Includes sound effects and particles for looting and physics collisions, ready to drag and drop into your world.
  • High-quality 4K textures with detailed albedo, normal, and roughness maps.
  • Includes interior and open/closed variations.

meridian1988_postoffice_modularenvironme.description_text:
A storm has cut Meridian, Virginia off from the mainland—but it isn’t the weather that keeps people from leaving.

The fog has settled. The streets are silent. The townsfolk are acting strange. At night, church bells drift across the harbor, and uneasy gatherings take place behind shuttered windows.

Meridian 1988 is a collection of eerie, story-rich environments inspired by the coastal towns of East Coast America—empty homes, dimly lit chapels, quiet main streets, and weathered seaside structures.

Explore the remnants of the town of Meridian - you may discover something far more sinister watching from the dark.

Documentation: https://dekogon.notion.site/Town-Buildings-Meridian-1988-f9387634a8bd42909e7d8062fa1adc0d?source=copy_link

savethechildren.description_text:
Donations to support Save the Children are made to PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Save the Children believes every child deserves a future. In 120 countries around the world, they work every day to give children a healthy start in life, the opportunity to learn in school and protection from harm. When crisis strikes, and children are most vulnerable, they are among the first to respond and the last to leave. They ensure children’s unique needs are met and their voices are heard. They do whatever it takes to reach every last child.

semi-permanentblooddroplets.description_text:
Supports UE4.27 - UE5.01

More Information & Product Guide

Are you tired of games where the aftermath of the battle disappears before the battle is even over? Do you want to give your players a sense of permanence and satisfaction as they look around at the mess their battle created?

Look no further! This particle system is designed to provide you with flexible, realistic blood droplets. It leverages the power of instanced mesh decals and randomization to give your battles a unique and bloody feel. Make each hit count and get that extra bit of oomph with gore that has impact.

The particles are lightweight and leverage expressions and curvature control to give each droplet impact.

Bring the boom to your game’s battles with high-definition T90 & M1A2 battle tanks, zombie soldiers, and more. Or build the dystopian future of your dreams with a cyberpunk city, futuristic airship, noir city apartment, and beyond! basic_data.human_name: Humble Software Bundle: Sci-Fi Game Dev Assets by Synty
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Ready the engines—it’s time to blast off with a massive collection of sci-fi game dev assets by Synty! Power up your project with the sharpest polygon assets, usher in particle FX packs, and construct breathtaking sci-fi cityscapes rich with buildings, vehicles, infrastructure, and everything else you need to bring life to your fictional worlds beyond the stars. Design intricate HUDs for your out-of-this-world Sidekick soldiers. Pay what you want for a star-studded collection of assets and help support Child’s Play with your purchase!
basic_data.description:
Out-of-this-world assets. Ready the engines—it’s time to blast off with a massive collection of sci-fi game dev assets by Synty! Power up your project with the sharpest polygon assets, usher in particle FX packs, and construct breathtaking sci-fi cityscapes rich with buildings, vehicles, infrastructure, and everything else you need to bring life to your fictional worlds beyond the stars. Design intricate HUDs for your out-of-this-world Sidekick soldiers. Pay what you want for a star-studded collection of assets and help support Child’s Play with your purchase!

Pay $30 or more. Normally, the total cost for the software in this bundle is as much as $639. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $30 purchase. Pay $30 or more to access keys.

Redeem your keys. Redeem on Synty Store webpage.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publisher and to support Child's Play. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

interface_sci-fisoldierhud.description_text:
Synty® Studios Presents: INTERFACE - Sci-Fi Soldier HUD

Quickly build out your game HUD with dozens of pre-built HUD elements! Action bars, minimaps, compasses, weapon wheels, HP bars, damage FX, crosshairs - we’ve added everything we could think of to help you quickly assemble a quality-looking, responsive HUD. Each component can be visually customized to suit your game’s needs.

Key Features:

- For Unity and Unreal Engine

- 1,000+ sprites and icons assembled into over 150 prefabs (with animations!)

- Comprehensive range of input icons for controller types including PC, Xbox, PS, and Switch

- Text and numeric buttons can be tinted, localised and customised

*The UI elements contained in this pack are 2D and intended to work with 2D systems. No 3D models are included.

*Contents may vary between engines.

Synty® Studios presents: POLYGON - Sci-Fi City

A low-poly asset pack of characters, props, weapons, vehicles and environment assets to create a Sci-Fi themed style game. Modular sections are easy to piece together in a variety of combinations!

Key Features:

- For Unity and Unreal Engine

- 500+ unique assets

- 24 alternative texture colours

- 20 characters with alternate colors

- 18 weapons with attachments

- 9 Sci-Fi themed vehicles

- 17 visual FX

- Sci-Fi City demo scene

*Contents may vary between engines.

childsplay.description_text:
Donations to support Child's Play Charity are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The Child's Play Charity works to channel the goodwill of the worldwide gaming community into video games and game systems for sick children in hospitals. Child's Play works directly with hospitals worldwide to identify what kinds of games and systems can be installed in hospital wards and distributed "for keeps" to child patients. Since 2003, Child's Play has coordinated the donation of millions of dollars of games and game systems, making them a premier charity for helping children in need of the joy that games can bring.

polygon_sci-fispacepack.description_text:
Synty® Studios presents: POLYGON - Sci-Fi Space Pack

A low-poly asset pack including spaceships, characters, props, weapons, FX, and environment assets to create a Sci-Fi themed style game. Modular sections are easy to piece together in a variety of combinations.

Key Features:

- Dozens of ships, ready to go!

- Modular spaceship kit to build your own ships from dozens of parts

- Dozens of characters to fill your Sci-Fi world

- Environment content including planets, asteroids, space stations, interiors and more!

- 660 unique assets with 24 alternative texture colors

- VR/first person ready cockpit

- Demo scene included

*Contents may vary between engines.

syntystore10usdvoucher.description_text:
This coupon will get you $10 USD off your next order from the Synty Store.

By purchasing on the Synty store, you will be directly supporting the developers at Synty Studios, this will allow us to make even more cool assets.

sidekickpack_sci-fisoldiers.description_text:
Synty Studios presents: Sci-Fi Soldiers – Sidekick Modular Characters

Gear up for battle with 300+ character parts including helmets, armour, weapons, and more, designed to deliver the synthetic agents your project needs. Unleash your creativity or utilise our expert presets. Whether you're building a full in-game character creator, or just changing outfits on the fly, the Sidekick Runtime API makes it easy.

Key Features:

- 300+ modular, rigged Sci-Fi Soldier parts

- 90+ modular, rigged human base species parts

- Dynamic joints

- Facial blend shapes for expressions and lipsync

- Body blend shapes to adjust body type and proportions

Sidekick Character Creator Tool (Editor Extension) Features:

- Customise material colours directly in the editor

- Expert presets to enable rapid character creation

- Bake completed characters into a single optimised prefab, combining all skinned mesh renderers into one for performance friendly deployment

- Runtime API for in-game character customisation

*Contents may vary between engines.

animation_baselocomotion.description_text:
Say goodbye to the hassle of sourcing animations from all over the internet and constructing your controller from scratch – our comprehensive pack equips you with everything you need to bring your characters to life in no time.

This powerhouse pack is brimming with essential animations for every common character motion need – from leisurely walks to adrenaline-pumping sprints, graceful jumps to heart-racing slides. With each state meticulously crafted, complete with multiple animations and smooth transitions, your characters will move with unparalleled grace. Includes animations for both masculine and feminine figures.

polygon_prototypepack.description_text:
Unity 2019.4 and above, Unreal 4.14 and above

3D game asset pack with over 440 detailed low poly assets for Unity and Unreal. Includes characters, props, environments, vehicles and more.

The POLYGON - Prototype Pack is the perfect solution for game developers looking for a wide variety of high-quality, low poly assets for Unity and Unreal game engines. This 3D asset pack offers a diverse range of assets, including characters, environments, and props, making it the ideal choice for game prototyping and testing. Whether you're a seasoned game developer or just starting, this pack is the perfect tool to help you bring your game ideas to life.

polygon_particlefxpack.description_text:
Synty® Studios presents: POLYGON - Particle FX Pack

A particle FX asset pack including fire, water, smoke, dust, dirt, blood, nature, weapons, magic and more, to add to your POLYGON or low-poly style project.

Watch Unity and Unreal Engine showcases of the FX included in this pack on YouTube.

Key Features:

- For Unity and Unreal Engine

- 120+ particle FX

- FX designed to complement the POLYGON asset series

- Lightweight particles to keep performance running smoothly

*Contents may vary between engines.

childsplay.description_text:
Donations to support Child's Play Charity are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The Child's Play Charity works to channel the goodwill of the worldwide gaming community into video games and game systems for sick children in hospitals. Child's Play works directly with hospitals worldwide to identify what kinds of games and systems can be installed in hospital wards and distributed "for keeps" to child patients. Since 2003, Child's Play has coordinated the donation of millions of dollars of games and game systems, making them a premier charity for helping children in need of the joy that games can bring.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: Sci-Fi Game Dev Assets by Synty
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get $10 Voucher, POLYGON - Prototype Pack, POLYGON - Particle FX Pack, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Ready the engines—it’s time to blast off with a massive collection of sci-fi game dev assets by Synty! Power up your project with the sharpest polygon assets, usher in particle FX packs, and construct breathtaking sci-fi cityscapes rich with buildings, vehicles, infrastructure, and everything else you need to bring life to your fictional worlds beyond the stars. Design intricate HUDs for your out-of-this-world Sidekick soldiers. Pay what you want for a star-studded collection of assets and help support Child’s Play with your purchase!
from_bundle.author: Synty Studios

And with Realms you gain access to 400+ effect presets, 4 dynamic effect modules, easily accessible presets, and countless other pro-quality tools. Unlock Sample Logic’s best tools and help support Music Will with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before March 30th, 2027

animationstation20.description_text:
Animation Station 2.0: Supercharge Your Synths

Need an epic soundtrack or a quick melody? Animation Station 2.0 is the ultimate MIDI arpeggiator and step sequencer. It takes any virtual instrument or drum machine and instantly generates professional musical phrases. Just play a simple chord and let the intelligent engine take you on a creative ride!

Celebrated by industry legends like Jean-Michel Jarre and Ramin Djawadi, it features over 750 presets and a real-time 4-pattern switching system. Best of all, you can drag and drop the generated MIDI straight into your DAW for total control. Whether you are crafting high-speed battle music or ambient textures, this is your ultimate cheat code for fast, inspiring music creation!

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
  • Mac OS X 10.11, i5, M1, 4 GB RAM (6 GB recommended)
  • Windows 7, 8, 10, Intel Core i5 or equivalent CPU, 4 GB RAM (6 GB recommended)
  • 50 MB free disk space for application
COMPATIBILITY (Mac 64-bit only; Windows 32/64-bit)
  • VST
  • Audio Unit (AU)
  • AAX
  • Loads as virtual instrument plugin or MIDI effect plugin depending on DAW.

realms.description_text:
REALMS: Step into New Sonic Dimensions Level up your sound design!

REALMS is a powerful multi-effect and reverb plugin that blends digital delay, dub, chorus, and convolution to create lush acoustic environments. Perfect for indie developers and music makers, it instantly transforms ordinary audio into immersive, game-ready textures.

Praised by top composers like John Debney and Tom Salta, you can navigate 400+ presets and 162 impulse responses with an intuitive X-Y morphing pad. Need quick inspiration? The intelligent randomization engine gives you endless combinations that always sound musical. Say goodbye to tedious effect chains. Turn a simple sound into an otherworldly soundscape with just one click!

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
• OSX 10.13+ / Windows 10+
• Minimum Hardware: i5 Processor, 8GB RAM
• 1.35 GB free storage space for Mac / 550 MB free storage space for PC
• Not all computer configurations supported when highly customized*

COMPATIBILITY
VST2 / VST3 / Audio Units (AU) (64-bit only)

littlekidsrock.description_text:
Donations to support Musci Will are made to PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Music Will runs the largest nonprofit music program in the US public school system. Our teachers currently serve over 500,000 students in more than 600 cities and towns across the country.

We believe that music education is a right, not a privilege, and it should reflect the cultures of the students it serves.

That’s why, for two decades now, our programs have taught students such popular American genres as rock, pop, R&B, Latin, rap and country—alongside styles already taught in schools, such as classical and jazz.

Today, a national network of K-12 districts has adopted the Music Will program as their own.

More than 70 colleges and universities now teach our approach to their music education majors. Several state departments of education have partnered with Music Will to grow music education in the schools they serve.

Our mission of transforming lives by transforming music education has grown into a movement.

basic_data.human_name: Humble Comic Bundle:  EC Comics: The Resurrection Bundle by Oni Press
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: The name EC Comics strikes fear into the hearts of its fans for one simple reason: these tales of the undead, unexplained, and altogether unholy are unlike anything even the gnarliest horror aficionado has ever witnessed. That’s why we’ve collected the very best into one convenient bundle to amuse and horrify! Enjoy (if you dare) the terrors and trials of Catacomb of Torment! Travel (if you can muster up the courage) to the distant worlds and blood-soaked shores of Cruel Universe! Peruse (if you can stomach the thought) the chronicles of monsters and madness in Epitaphs from the Abyss! All of these series and more are included in this bundle of frights and phantoms, so add these horror stories to your necronomicon while you can, and support the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund with your purchase. It may be your laaaaaast!
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: You’ve never seen horror like this before
basic_data.description:
You’ve never seen horror like this before. The name EC Comics strikes fear into the hearts of its fans for one simple reason: these tales of the undead, unexplained, and altogether unholy are unlike anything even the gnarliest horror aficionado has ever witnessed. That’s why we’ve collected the very best into one convenient bundle to amuse and horrify! Enjoy (if you dare) the terrors and trials of Catacomb of Torment! Travel (if you can muster up the courage) to the distant worlds and blood-soaked shores of Cruel Universe! Peruse (if you can stomach the thought) the chronicles of monsters and madness in Epitaphs from the Abyss! All of these series and more are included in this bundle of frights and phantoms, so add these horror stories to your necronomicon while you can, and support the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund with your purchase. It may be your laaaaaast!

Pay $10 or more. Normally, the total cost for the comics in this bundle is as much as $205. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $10 purchase.
